announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Alankit Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Outcome of Board Meeting held on March 26, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Alankit Limited announced on March 26, 2026, the outcomes of its Board of Directors meeting. The board approved the sale of gold held as an investment. Additionally, the board approved an investment in Alankit Imaginations Limited, which is a wholly-owned subsidiary of the company. The board meeting commenced at 1:15 P.M. (IST) and concluded at 1:40 P.M. (IST) on March 26, 2026. The outcome of the meeting is also being uploaded to the company's website.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Blue Dart Express Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Blue Dart Express Limited disclosed on March 26, 2026, that it received a letter dated March 25, 2026, from the Deputy Commissioner of State Tax, Mumbai. This letter pertains to an authorization for an inspection or search. The details of the action, which is an inspection/search under Rule 139(1) of the Central Goods and Services Tax Act, 2017, are provided in Annexure-A. The company has requested that this information be taken on record.

announcements.subject: Acquisition
announcements.detail: Allied Digital Services Limited has informed the Exchange about Acquisition
announcements.ai_summary: Allied Digital Services Limited has announced an equity conversion by its wholly owned overseas subsidiary, Allied Digital Inc. Effective March 25, 2026, Allied Digital Inc. will convert its entire outstanding loan into equity by issuing 6,868 equity shares to the parent company. The conversion price is set at USD 1,877.99 per share, with a face value of USD 10 per share, resulting in a total conversion value of USD 12.89 million. This transaction is a continuation of the company's disclosure dated February 04, 2026, and is in accordance with SEBI regulations.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: The Federal Bank  Limited has informed the Exchange about Allotment of Equity Shares on exercise of Stock options pursuant to Employee Stock Option Scheme
announcements.ai_summary: On March 25, 2026, The Federal Bank Limited made allotments of equity shares following the exercise of stock options under its Employee Stock Option Schemes. Under the ESOS 2010 Scheme, 1,500 equity shares with a face value of Rs. 2/- each were allotted to option grantees. Additionally, under the ESOS 2017 Scheme, 24,410 equity shares, also with a face value of Rs. 2/-, were allotted to option grantees. These allotments were made after the receipt of payment from the respective allottees, as approved by the Nomination, Remuneration, Ethics and Compensation Committee.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Billionbrains Garage Ventures Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'The CCI has considered the proposed transaction as mentioned in the attachment and approved the same'.
announcements.ai_summary: Billionbrains Garage Ventures Limited has received approval from the Competition Commission of India (CCI) for a proposed transaction. This approval follows the company's earlier disclosure on January 14, 2026, regarding the execution of a Share Subscription and Share Purchase Agreement (SSPA) and a Shareholders’ Agreement (SHA). These agreements are in relation to an investment in Groww Asset Management Limited (Groww AMC) by State Street Global Advisors, Inc. The CCI's approval, bearing Registration No. C-2026/02/1385, signifies a significant step towards the completion of the proposed transaction.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Ritco Logistics Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Outcome of Independent Director Meeting held on March 26, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: On March 26, 2026, Ritco Logistics Limited held a separate meeting of its Independent Directors for the Financial Year 2025-26. The meeting, which commenced at 10:00 a.m. and concluded at 10:30 a.m., focused on reviewing key governance aspects. The independent directors assessed the performance of non-independent directors and the board as a whole. They also reviewed the performance of the company's chairperson, considering input from executive and non-executive directors. Furthermore, the quality, quantity, and timeliness of information flow from management to the board were evaluated to ensure effective board functioning.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Vedant Fashions Limited has informed the Exchange regarding the compounding under the Legal Metrology Act, 2009, vide the enclosed letter.
announcements.ai_summary: Vedant Fashions Limited has provided an update regarding a compounding proceeding under the Legal Metrology Act, 2009. On December 16, 2025, the company received a Seizure Memo from the Department of Legal Metrology, Varanasi, citing an alleged violation related to non-disclosure of product size on labels. The company responded by requesting compounding of the offence on February 20, 2026, proposing a minimum applicable fee. Subsequently, on March 17, 2026, the Authority issued a notice related to this matter. The company has enclosed a letter detailing these developments for the exchange's records.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: L&T Technology Services Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 25, 2026, titled "L&T Technology Services Pivots on Engineering Intelligence, Divests SWC Business".
announcements.ai_summary: L&T Technology Services Limited has issued a press release dated March 25, 2026, titled "L&T Technology Services Pivots on Engineering Intelligence, Divests SWC Business." This release follows the company's announcement of entering into a Business Transfer Agreement to sell its Smart World and Communication Business Unit. The press release provides further details on the company's strategic decision to divest this business segment. Investors can refer to the press release for a comprehensive understanding of the rationale and implications of this divestment.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Lemon Tree Hotels Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 25, 2026, titled "Opening of Keys Select by Lemon Tree Hotels, Vadodara".
announcements.ai_summary: Lemon Tree Hotels Limited has announced the opening of its new property, Keys Select by Lemon Tree Hotels, Vadodara. This marks the 11th property for the company in Gujarat. The hotel features 42 well-appointed rooms, a restaurant, a banquet hall, and a meeting room. This is a slight adjustment from the previously disclosed 45 rooms on October 17, 2023. The company has released a press release detailing this new opening, which is available on their website and has been submitted to the stock exchanges.

announcements.subject: Change in Auditors
announcements.detail: Punjab National Bank has informed the Exchange regarding Change in Auditors of the company.
announcements.ai_summary: Punjab National Bank has informed the Exchange about a change in its Statutory Central Auditors (SCAs) for the Financial Year 2025-26. Pursuant to a letter from the Reserve Bank of India dated March 25, 2026, M/s P S D & Associates has ceased to be part of the SCA team with immediate effect. The following firms will continue as the Statutory Central Auditors for the Financial Year 2025-26: M/s Ummed Jain & Co., M/s N K Bhargava & Co., M/s Prem Gupta & Co., and M/s P A & Associates. This information is being submitted in compliance with Regulation 30 and 51 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Amalgamation/Merger
announcements.detail: Network18 Media & Investments Limited has informed the Exchange about Amalgamation/Merger
announcements.ai_summary: Network18 Media & Investments Limited's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on March 25, 2026, approved a scheme of amalgamation. This scheme, under Sections 230 to 232 of the Companies Act, 2013, provides for the amalgamation of News18 Marathi Private Limited with Network18 Media & Investments Limited. News18 Marathi Private Limited is a wholly-owned subsidiary of the company. The appointed date for this amalgamation is the opening business hours of April 1, 2026. This merger aims to consolidate the operations of the Marathi news channel. As it is a merger of a wholly-owned subsidiary with the parent company, it is considered a related party transaction at arm's length, and no consideration is being paid.

announcements.company: Deepak Fertilizers and Petrochemicals Corporation Limited
announcements.subject: Agreements
announcements.detail: Deepak Fertilizers And Petrochemicals Corporation Limited has informed the Exchange about Agreements
announcements.ai_summary: Deepak Fertilizers And Petrochemicals Corporation Limited has entered into a Novation Agreement on March 25, 2026, with Equinor ASA and its Singapore-based wholly-owned subsidiary, Deepak Globalchem PTE. LTD (DGPL). This agreement novates the long-term supply agreement for Liquefied Natural Gas (LNG) that was originally entered into between Deepak Fertilizers and Petrochemicals Corporation Limited and Equinor on February 19, 2024. The novated LNG supply arrangement will provide annual supplies of up to 0.65 million tonnes for a period of 15 years, commencing from 2026, on the same commercial terms as the original agreement.

announcements.subject: Other Restructuring
announcements.detail: Persistent Systems Limited has informed the Exchange about Other Restructuring
announcements.ai_summary: Persistent Systems Limited has signed a Share Purchase Agreement (SPA) on March 25, 2026, for the transfer of 100% shareholding of its wholly-owned subsidiary, Persistent Systems France S.A.S., to Aepona Group Limited, Ireland, another wholly-owned subsidiary. This transaction is part of an internal group restructuring.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Torrent Pharmaceuticals Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Torrent Pharmaceuticals Limited has issued a Corrigendum Order dated March 24, 2026, from the National Company Law Tribunal, Ahmedabad Bench. This order is in continuation of a previous intimation dated March 24, 2026, regarding the proposed amalgamation of J.B. Chemicals & Pharmaceuticals Limited with Torrent Pharmaceuticals Limited. The corrigendum order has been uploaded on the Tribunal's website, nclt.gov.in, on March 25, 2026. This update is for the information and records of the exchange.

announcements.company: Jaro Institute of Technology Management and Research Limited
announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Jaro Institute of Technology Management and Research Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Approved and allotment of 2,352 fully paid-up equity shares of Rs. 10/- each upon exercise of options granted under Jaro Education Employee Stock Option Plan 2022.'.
announcements.ai_summary: Jaro Institute of Technology Management and Research Limited's Board of Directors, through a resolution passed on March 25, 2026, has allotted 2,352 fully paid-up equity shares of Rs. 10/- each. These shares were allotted upon the exercise of options granted under the Jaro Education Employee Stock Option Plan 2022 to eligible employees.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Shreeji Shipping Global Limited has informed the Exchange about Incorporation of Subsidiary Company under the name Shreeji Tisha Maritime Private Limited, bearing Corporate Identification Number (CIN): U69100GJ2026PTC175627. The Certificate of Incorporation was issued by the Central Registration Centre, Manesar, on March 25, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Shreeji Shipping Global Limited has incorporated a new subsidiary named Shreeji Tisha Maritime Private Limited, with Corporate Identification Number U69100GJ2026PTC175627. The Certificate of Incorporation was issued by the Central Registration Centre, Manesar, on March 25, 2026. This new entity will be involved in activities such as shipping cargo agency services and the building of ships and floating structures, representing a strategic move to expand business operations and create new growth avenues.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Deepak Nitrite Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Deepak Nitrite Limited received an order on March 25, 2026, from the Assistant Commissioner of State Tax, Unit-40, Vadodara, Gujarat, dated March 7, 2026, under the Gujarat Goods and Service Tax Act, 2017. The specific details of the order are provided in Annexure I to the company's filing.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Sula Vineyards Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 25, 2026, titled "Sula Vineyards (NSE: SULA) Signs a Definitive Agreement to Acquire Chandon s World-Class Wine Estate Spanning 19 Acres in Nashik to Expand its Wine Tourism Footprint".
announcements.ai_summary: Sula Vineyards Limited has announced the signing of a definitive agreement to acquire Chandon's wine production estate, which spans 19 acres in Nashik. This acquisition is aimed at expanding Sula Vineyards' wine tourism footprint. The press release, dated March 25, 2026, details this strategic move by India's largest wine producer to enhance its presence in the wine tourism sector.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: NIBE Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Outcome of Board Meeting held on March 25, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: NIBE Limited's Board of Directors, in their meeting held on March 25, 2026, approved the appointment of Mr. Rajagopalan Madhavan (DIN: 08209860) as an Additional Director, Non-Executive and Independent. This appointment is effective from March 25, 2026, for a period of five years, subject to shareholder approval. The details required under SEBI LODR Regulations are annexed.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Aksh Optifibre Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Aksh Optifibre Limited has received a Rectification Order dated March 25, 2026, from the Deputy Commissioner, Rajasthan State Tax, Jaipur. This order modifies a previous demand dated December 29, 2025. The original demand, which included applicable interest and penalty, was ₹5,73,47,563. The rectified demand, along with applicable interest and penalty, has been reduced to ₹94,22,212. The company is in the process of filing an appeal against the remaining balance demand and does not foresee any material impact on its financials or operations.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Dredging Corporation of India Limited has informed the Exchange about extension of charge of Dr. Madhaiyaan Angamuthu, IAS as Chairman (Additional Charge), Visakhapatnam Port Authority
announcements.ai_summary: Dredging Corporation of India Limited has been informed about the extension of the additional charge of Dr. Madhaiyaan Angamuthu, IAS, as Chairman of the Visakhapatnam Port Authority. This extension is in line with previous communications and follows a letter from the Ministry of Ports, Shipping and Waterways dated March 17, 2026. Dr. Angamuthu, who is also the Chairperson of Mumbai Port Authority, was initially entrusted with this additional charge from September 22, 2025, for six months or until a regular Chairperson is appointed.

announcements.subject: Action(s) initiated or orders passed
announcements.detail: Transport Corporation of India Limited has informed the Exchange about Action(s) initiated or orders passed
announcements.ai_summary: Transport Corporation of India Limited has received an assessment order under Section 143(3) of the Income Tax Act, 1961, for the Assessment Year 2024-25, along with a Demand Notice under Section 156 of the IT Act. These were issued by the Assessment Unit of the Income Tax Department on March 25, 2026. The company noted that it had not received any prior show cause notice regarding this assessment. Further details are provided in Annexure-A.

announcements.subject: Action(s) initiated or orders passed
announcements.detail: Pidilite Industries Limited has informed the Exchange about Action(s) initiated or orders passed
announcements.ai_summary: Pidilite Industries Limited has received orders dated March 24, 2026, from the Assistant Commissioner (ST), Atchuthapuram Circle, Visakhapatnam II, Andhra Pradesh. These orders impose a penalty of ₹1,17,21,593/- for FY 2021-22 to 2023-24 and ₹3,76,616/- for FY 2024-25 under the Central Goods and Services Tax Act. The company is reviewing the orders and evaluating its next steps, including the possibility of an appeal. Pidilite Industries stated that there is no material impact on its financials, operations, or other activities.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Jet Freight Logistics Limited has informed the Exchange about Intimation on the Participation of Jet Freight Logistics Limited (the  Company ) in India International Cargo Show 2026 ( IICS 2026 )
announcements.ai_summary: Jet Freight Logistics Limited announced its participation in the India International Cargo Show 2026 (IICS 2026), scheduled from June 03, 2026, to June 05, 2026, at Bharat Mandapam, New Delhi. This participation aims to showcase the company's logistics capabilities across air, ocean, road, and cold chain services. The event is expected to facilitate engagement with key stakeholders, exploration of strategic partnerships, and identification of new business opportunities, aligning with the company's growth objectives.

announcements.subject: Disclosure of material issue
announcements.detail: Rashtriya Chemicals and Fertilizers Limited has informed regarding Disclosure of material issue
announcements.ai_summary: Rashtriya Chemicals and Fertilizers Limited has informed the exchange about a significant legal development. The company had filed appeals before the Hon'ble Supreme Court of India against various show cause notices and orders related to the period from 1996 to 2005. On March 24, 2026, the Hon'ble Supreme Court set aside the impugned orders-in-original dated January 27, 2010, and February 04, 2010, as well as the order passed by the Customs Excise and Service Tax Appellate Tribunal (CESTAT).

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Capacite Infraprojects Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Outcome of Board Meeting held on March 25, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Capacit'e Infraprojects Limited, at their meeting held on March 25, 2026, approved the appointment of Mr. Chilakamarri Lakshmi Narasimha Charyulu (DIN: 09376516) as an Additional Independent Director. This appointment is for a term of 3 consecutive years and is effective immediately, subject to shareholder approval via a special resolution. The company confirmed that Mr. Charyulu meets all criteria for an Independent Director.

announcements.subject: Name and Symbol Change
announcements.detail: EXCEL: Members of the Exchange are hereby informed that the name of Excel Realty N Infra Limited shall be changed to Landsmill Green Limited and symbol be changed to LANDSMILL w.e.f. April 02, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Excel Realty N Infra Limited will be renamed Landsmill Green Limited, and its stock symbol will change from EXCEL to LANDSMILL. This change will be effective from April 02, 2026. The National Stock Exchange of India has issued a circular regarding this name and symbol change.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: BLACKBUCK LIMITED has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: On March 23, 2026, the Nomination and Remuneration Committee of BLACKBUCK LIMITED approved the allotment of 1,24,263 equity shares, each with a face value of Re. 1/-, pursuant to the exercise of options granted under the BlackBuck Limited Employee Stock Option Scheme 2016 (ESOP 2016) and BlackBuck Limited Employee Stock Option Scheme 2019 (ESOP 2019). Specifically, 66,059 shares were allotted under ESOP 2016 and 58,204 shares under ESOP 2019. This allotment will increase the company's issued, subscribed, and paid-up equity share capital from Rs. 18,16,72,349/-.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Finkurve Financial Services Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Compliances-Reg. 57 (1) - Certificate of interest payment/Principal in case of NCD'.
announcements.ai_summary: Finkurve Financial Services Limited has certified that the interest payment for its Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) with ISIN INE734I07032 has been duly made to all NCD holders before the due date. The interest payment, part of an issue size of Rs. 21,00,00,000/-, amounted to Rs. 54,76,967.00 (net of TDS) and was due on a quarterly basis. This certification is in compliance with Regulation 57 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, and was communicated on March 25, 2026.

announcements.subject: Disclosure of material issue
announcements.detail: Visaka Industries Limited has informed regarding Disclosure of material issue
announcements.ai_summary: Visaka Industries Limited has informed the exchange about the receipt of an Assessment Order and related demand notices from the Income Tax Department. On March 23, 2026, the company received an Assessment Order under Section 143(3) of the Income-tax Act, 1961, for Assessment Year 2024-25, along with a Demand Notice under Section 156 of the IT Act. These were issued by the Assessment Unit of the Income Tax Department. The details required under Regulation 30 of SEBI Listing Regulations are provided in Annexures A.

announcements.subject: Agreements
announcements.detail: Sula Vineyards Limited has informed the Exchange about Agreements
announcements.ai_summary: Sula Vineyards Limited's wholly-owned subsidiary, Artisan Spirits Private Limited (ASPL), approved the purchase of identified assets from Moët Hennessy India Private Limited (MHIP) on March 25, 2026. The assets include land, buildings, plant, and machinery forming the estate of Domaine Chandon India in Dindori, Nashik. The consideration for this asset purchase is Rs. 20 Crores, excluding inventory, taxes, and other statutory levies. ASPL has entered into an Asset Purchase Agreement (APA) with MHIP, which is subject to the satisfaction of closing conditions and completion of closing deliverables.

announcements.subject: Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts
announcements.detail: Bartronics India Limited has informed the Exchange about Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts
announcements.ai_summary: Avio Smart Market Stack Limited (formerly Bartronics India Limited) has received a Purchase Order from Indian Overseas Bank. The order is for empanelment as a Corporate Business Correspondent Service Provider, focusing on the engagement and management of Business Correspondent Agents (BCAs) under Financial Inclusion Technology. This disclosure is made pursuant to Schedule III (Part A) of Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The significant terms and conditions of the order are provided in Annexure A.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Ceigall India Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Ceigall India Limited's Management Committee of the Board of Directors, in a meeting held on March 25, 2026, has authorized the execution of a Non-Binding Offer (NBO) letter. This NBO is from an Asset Management Company concerning the proposed sale of 100% equity stake in two of its subsidiaries: Ceigall Jalbehra Shahbad Greenfield Highway Private Limited and Ceigall Bathinda Dabwali Highways Private Limited. The potential transaction is contingent upon the completion of due diligence, negotiation of definitive agreements, and receipt of all necessary regulatory, statutory, and lender approvals.

announcements.subject: Capacity addition
announcements.detail: Crown Lifters Limited has informed the Exchange about  Acquisition of 800 MT Crawler Crane
announcements.ai_summary: Crown Lifters Limited has successfully completed the acquisition of an 800 MT crawler crane in March 2026, which has since been deployed at a project site. This acquisition, valued at approximately ₹18 crore, contributes to the company's total capital expenditure of around ₹50 crore for the financial year 2025–26. The addition of this high-capacity crane significantly enhances Crown Lifters' capabilities in executing complex projects across sectors such as Renewable Energy, Refineries, Cement, Steel, and Infrastructure, including High-Speed Rail projects. This follows an earlier disclosure on February 12, 2026, regarding the proposed acquisition.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Anmol India Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Anmol India Limited has informed the Exchange about the reconstitution of its Board Committees following the resignation of Mr. Sanjeev Kumar, an Independent Director, effective March 17, 2026. The Audit Committee has been reconstituted with Mr. Ripan Goyal, an Independent Director, appointed as Chairperson in place of Mr. Sanjeev Kumar. The new composition of the Audit Committee includes Mr. Ripan Goyal (Chairperson), Mr. Vijay Kumar (Managing Director & CFO), and Mr. Bhupesh Goyal (Independent Director). Additionally, the Nomination & Remuneration Committee has been reconstituted with Mr. Ripan Goyal appointed as a Member, replacing Mr. Sanjeev Kumar.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Ceigall India Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 25, 2026, titled "Ceigall India Strengthens Renewable Portfolio with 337 MW Solar PPAs in Maharashtra".
announcements.ai_summary: Ceigall India Limited, through its wholly-owned subsidiaries Ceigall Green Energy MH1 Limited and Ceigall Green Energy MH2 Limited, has executed Power Purchase Agreements (PPAs) with Maharashtra State Electricity Distribution Co. Ltd. on March 24, 2026. These PPAs are for contract capacities of 190 MW and 147 MW, respectively, totaling 337 MW under the Mukhyamantri Saur Krushi Vahini Yojana 2.0. The agreements involve the operation, maintenance, and supply of solar photovoltaic power for 25 years at a quoted tariff ranging from Rs. 2.72 to Rs. 2.84 per unit. This announcement follows a previous letter dated October 29, 2025, and is in compliance with SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: BALAXI PHARMACEUTICALS LIMITED has informed the Exchange regarding Outcome of Board Meeting held on March 25, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Balaxi Pharmaceuticals Limited announced the outcomes of its Board Meeting held on March 25, 2026. The Board of Directors approved the appointment of Mr. Aman Purohit as the Company Secretary and Compliance Officer, effective from March 25, 2026. This appointment was made based on the recommendation of the Nomination and Remuneration Committee. The meeting commenced at 11:45 a.m. IST and concluded at 12:50 p.m. IST. Further details required by SEBI Master Circular No. HO/49/14/14(7)2025-CFD-POD2/I/3762/2026 are enclosed. The information is also available on the company's website.

announcements.subject: Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts
announcements.detail: Power & Instrumentation (Gujarat) Limited has informed the Exchange about Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts
announcements.ai_summary: Power & Instrumentation (Gujarat) Limited has secured an additional work order worth Rs. 11,72,16,053/- from M/s Ajmer Vidyut Vitran Nigam Limited. This order is for the supply, erection, installation, testing, and commissioning of materials and equipment for distribution infrastructure development. The project focuses on the on-grid electrification of unelectrified households and public institutions across nine circles in tribal villages of Ajmer Discom. These works are part of the Dharti Aaba Janjatiya Gram Utkarsh Abhiyana (DA-JGUA) under the RDSS scheme, to be executed on a turnkey basis. The company had previously intimated about orders on August 11, 2025.

announcements.company: Gujarat Kidney And Super Speciality Limited
announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Gujarat Kidney And Super Speciality Limited has submitted to the Exchange, the financial results for the period ended September 30, 2025.
announcements.ai_summary: Gujarat Kidney And Super Speciality Limited has submitted its Unaudited Financial Results for the quarter ended September 30, 2025, on March 25, 2026. The company had previously uploaded these results on March 13, 2026, and March 14, 2026, on the BSE and NSE websites, respectively. Following an email received on March 23, 2026, the company is re-uploading the results under the specified path for compliance. The financial results will also be available on the company's website, www.gujaratsuperspecialityhospital.com. This submission is in compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The company secretary and compliance officer, Niki Tiwari, has signed the submission.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: GLOBE ENTERPRISES (INDIA) LIMITED has informed the Exchange about Re-constitution of Committees.
announcements.ai_summary: GLOBE ENTERPRISES (INDIA) LIMITED announced on March 25, 2026, the re-constitution of its Board Committees, effective from that date. This decision was approved by the Board of Directors in accordance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligation and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. Notably, Mr. Bharat Mulchandbhai Bhavsar (DIN: 11230569) has been inducted as the new Chairperson of the Audit Committee, replacing Mr. Yogesh Kanhiyalal Vaidya (DIN: 00468732). The Audit Committee now comprises Mr. Bharat M. Bhavsar (Chairperson, Non-Executive - Independent Director), Mr. Bhavik Suryakant Parikh (Member, Executive Director), and Mr. Rajatkumar Dineshbhai Patel (Member, Non-Executive - Independent Director). The Nomination and Remuneration Committee has also been reconstituted as per section 178 of the Companies Act, 2013.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: JM Financial Limited has informed the Exchange that the Company has subscribed to 24,25,000 ordinary shares of USD 1 each of JM Financial Overseas Holdings Private Limited, a wholly owned subsidiary of the Company. The aforesaid subscription is at a premium of USD 0.48 per ordinary share at an aggregate consideration of USS 3.59 million (approx. Rs. 33.70 crore)
announcements.ai_summary: JM Financial Limited announced on March 24, 2026, that it has subscribed to 24,25,000 ordinary shares of USD 1 each in JM Financial Overseas Holdings Private Limited, its wholly-owned subsidiary. The subscription was made at a premium of USD 0.48 per share, resulting in an aggregate consideration of USD 3.59 million, approximately Rs. 33.70 crore. This disclosure is made pursuant to Regulation 30 of SEBI LODR read with the SEBI Master Circular dated January 30, 2026. Hemant Pandya, Company Secretary & Compliance Officer, signed the disclosure.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Bartronics India Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 25, 2026, titled "Avio Smart Market Stack Collaborates with US-based Aquasafra and Waterfield Farms for Aquaculture Ecosystem".
announcements.ai_summary: Avio Smart Market Stack Limited (formerly Bartronics India Limited) has entered into a strategic Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) with US-based Aquasafra Holdings, Inc. (AHI) and Waterfield Farms, Inc. (WFI). This collaboration aims to explore the development of technology-driven aquaculture and fisheries ecosystems. Aquasafra, headquartered in the United States, possesses specialized capabilities in high-performance tilapia genetics.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Sterlite Technologies Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 25, 2026, titled "STL redefines Optical Connectivity with India s first Hollow Core fibre cable for Data Centre networks".
announcements.ai_summary: Sterlite Technologies Limited (STL) has announced a significant development in optical communication with the launch of India's first Hollow Core Fibre (HCF) cable. This innovative cable is designed for Data Centre networks and is positioned as a redefinition of optical connectivity. STL, a provider of connectivity solutions for AI-ready digital infrastructure, has released a press release detailing this breakthrough.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: REC Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Outcome of Board Meeting held on March 25, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: REC Limited's Board of Directors, in their meeting held on March 25, 2026, approved the Market Borrowing Programme for the financial year 2026-27. This programme includes domestic bonds and debentures, encompassing various types such as Infrastructure, Zero Coupon, Perpetual, and Subordinate instruments. The approval was made in compliance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Tata Power Company Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 25, 2026, titled "Tata Power Completes All Extra High Voltage (EHV) Transmission Lines under South East UP Power Transmission Company Limited (SEUPPTCL) Project with Commissioning of 400 kV Tanda Gonda and Gonda Basti Double Circuit".
announcements.ai_summary: Tata Power Company Limited has announced the successful commissioning of all Extra High Voltage (EHV) transmission lines under the South East UP Power Transmission Company Limited (SEUPPTCL) Project. This milestone was achieved with the commissioning of the 400 kV Tanda–Gonda and 400 kV Gonda–Basti double circuit transmission lines, spanning 154 circuit kilometers in Uttar Pradesh. This completion signifies the final phase of EHV transmission lines and substations for the SEUPPTCL project.

announcements.subject: Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts
announcements.detail: Larsen & Toubro Limited has informed the Exchange about Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts
announcements.ai_summary: Larsen & Toubro (L&T) Limited's Water & Effluent Treatment (WET) business vertical has secured a significant design-build-operate order from the Guwahati Metropolitan Drinking Water & Sewerage Board in Assam. This order is for a 24×7 water management project aimed at delivering safe and continuous water supply to households in South-East Guwahati. The scope of work includes design, supply, installation, and construction. The company announced this significant order on March 25, 2026, and has provided a press release to the BSE and NSE. The specific value of the order was not disclosed but is described as "significant."

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Lupin Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 25, 2026, titled "Lupin Receives Tentative Approval from U.S. FDA for Pitolisant Tablets".
announcements.ai_summary: Lupin Limited has received tentative approval from the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (U.S. FDA) for its Abbreviated New Drug Application (ANDA) for Pitolisant Tablets, available in 4.45mg and 17.8mg strengths. This approval, announced on March 25, 2026, signifies a positive step for the company's U.S. market presence. The Pitolisant Tablets will be manufactured at Lupin's Nagpur facility in India. The company has submitted this press release to the National Stock Exchange of India Limited and BSE Limited as per Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: PG Electroplast Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: PG Electroplast Limited (PGEL) has addressed constraints faced due to geopolitical tensions impacting LPG gas supplies, which had affected Room AC production. The company, on March 25, 2026, informed stakeholders that it has successfully identified and installed alternative energy sources at its production facilities. This measure has largely normalized current Room AC production and mitigated LPG challenges for the time being. PGEL had previously communicated these constraints on March 09, 2025. The company continues to assess the situation and explore further solutions.

announcements.subject: Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts
announcements.detail: Avantel Limited has informed the Exchange about Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts
announcements.ai_summary: Avantel Limited has secured a Rate Contract valued at Rs.459.90 Crores (exclusive of taxes) from an undisclosed counterparty, with Contract Reference No: ZMBL. This significant order was received on March 25, 2026. The company has informed the BSE and NSE about this development as per Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The specific terms of service and delivery schedules under this rate contract will be detailed in subsequent agreements. Avantel Limited's ISIN is INE005B01027.

announcements.subject: Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts
announcements.detail: RKEC Projects Limited has informed the Exchange about Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts
announcements.ai_summary: RKEC Projects Limited has been awarded a work order by the National Highways Authority of India (NHAI) for an amount of Rs. 40.50 Crore. The contract is for the "Balance work of new bridge on Gandak river including approaches and rehabilitation of the existing Gandak Bridge and Mahi Bridge of Chappara -Hajipur section of NH-19 in the state of Bihar on EPC mode". This order is in the ordinary course of RKEC Projects Limited's business. The announcement was made on March 24, 2026.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Pursuant to the provisions of the Listing Regulations and in continuation of our letter dated January 30, 2026 regarding the acquisition of 9,50,000 equity shares of Kajaria Surfaces Private Limited ( Kajaria Surfaces ), we wish to inform you that the Company has acquired 9,50,000 (i.e. 10%) equity shares of Kajaria Surfaces. Consequently, Kajaria Surfaces has become a wholly-owned subsidiary of the Company.
announcements.ai_summary: Kajaria Ceramics Limited has acquired an additional 9,50,000 equity shares, representing 10% of the total equity, in Kajaria Surfaces Private Limited. This acquisition, following a previous letter dated January 30, 2026, makes Kajaria Surfaces a wholly-owned subsidiary of Kajaria Ceramics Limited. Kajaria Surfaces, incorporated under the Companies Act, 2013, reported a turnover of Rs. 109.97 crores and a Profit After Tax of Rs. 1.09 crores as of March 31, 2025. The company is engaged in the manufacturing of tiles. This disclosure is made pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.company: Clean Max Enviro Energy Solutions Limited
announcements.subject: Giving guarantees/indemnity/ becoming a surety for third party
announcements.detail: Clean Max Enviro Energy Solutions Limited has informed the Exchange about issuance of Corporate Guarantee for Clean Max Narmada Private Limited and Clean Max Iguazu Private Limited, which are subsidiaries of the Company on 24 March 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Clean Max Enviro Energy Solutions Limited has issued a corporate guarantee for its subsidiaries, Clean Max Narmada Private Limited and Clean Max Iguazu Private Limited, on March 24, 2026. This action is in compliance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, and the Master Circular dated January 30, 2026. The details of this guarantee are provided in Annexure A and will be available on the company's website, www.cleanmax.com. This disclosure is for the information and record of the exchange.

announcements.subject: Action(s) initiated or orders passed
announcements.detail: Sasken Technologies Limited has informed the Exchange about Action(s) initiated or orders passed
announcements.ai_summary: Sasken Technologies Limited has informed the Exchange about an Assessment Order passed by the Assessment Unit, Income Tax Department, under section 143(3) read with section 144B of the Income Tax Act. This order is a part of the tax litigation or dispute process for the company. The details of this order are enclosed as per Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: IRB Infrastructure Developers Limited has informed the Exchange that the Company has now executed the Project Implementation Agreement for the TOT-18 Project.
announcements.ai_summary: IRB Infrastructure Developers Limited has executed the Project Implementation Agreement for the TOT-18 Project with IRB Chandibhadra Tollway Private Limited (IRBCTPL), a wholly-owned Special Purpose Vehicle (SPV) of IRB Infrastructure Trust. This agreement, finalized after shareholder approval on March 23, 2026, designates IRB Infrastructure Developers Limited to act as the Project Manager for the implementation of the TOT-18 Project, as per SEBI (Infrastructure Investment Trusts) Regulations, 2014. The company has confirmed the execution of this agreement with IRBCTPL.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: United Spirits Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 24, 2026, titled "Press Release".
announcements.ai_summary: United Spirits Limited (USL) has approved the sale of 14,690 equity shares of its wholly-owned subsidiary, Royal Challengers Sports Private Limited (RCSPL), for an aggregate consideration of INR 166.6 billion. This transaction, as detailed in the Share Purchase Agreement dated March 24, 2026, involves USL, RCSPL, and buyers including Bolt IPL Holdings LLC, Aelius Investments Pte Ltd, Asia Investment Topco II Pte. Ltd., Times Internet Limited, and Metro. The board of directors of USL made this approval at their meeting on March 24, 2026. Further details and conditions are outlined in the SPA.

announcements.subject: Agreements
announcements.detail: United Spirits Limited has informed the Exchange about Agreements
announcements.ai_summary: United Spirits Limited (USL) has disclosed that its Board of Directors, in a meeting held on March 24, 2026, approved the sale of 14,690 equity shares of Royal Challengers Sports Private Limited (RCSPL), a wholly-owned subsidiary. The aggregate consideration for this sale is INR 166.6 billion, subject to adjustments and other conditions outlined in the Share Purchase Agreement (SPA) dated March 24, 2026. The SPA was executed by USL, RCSPL, and several entities including Bolt IPL Holdings LLC, Aelius Investments Pte Ltd, Asia Investment Topco II Pte. Ltd., Times Internet Limited, and Metropo. This announcement is a follow-up to a previous disclosure on November 5, 2025.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: United Spirits Limited has informed the Exchange about sale of Royal Challengers Sports Private Limited (RCSPL), a wholly owned subsidiary of the Company.
announcements.ai_summary: United Spirits Limited (USL) announced that its Board of Directors, in a meeting held on March 24, 2026, approved the sale of 14,690 equity shares of Royal Challengers Sports Private Limited (RCSPL). RCSPL is a wholly-owned subsidiary of USL. The aggregate consideration for this sale is INR 166.6 billion, subject to adjustments and conditions stipulated in the Share Purchase Agreement (SPA) dated March 24, 2026. The SPA was executed by USL, RCSPL, and various buyers including Bolt IPL Holdings LLC, Aelius Investments Pte Ltd, Asia Investment Topco II Pte. Ltd., Times Internet Limited, and Metropo. This follows a prior disclosure made on November 5, 2025.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: HMT Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: HMT Limited has been informed by the Ministry of Heavy Industries, Government of India, that Shri. N. Ramesh Kumar, Executive Director of BHEL, has been entrusted with the additional charge of Chairman and Managing Director of HMT Limited. This appointment is effective from March 24, 2026, as per the order conveyed on the same date. This update is in compliance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Interarch Building Solutions Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Interarch Building Solutions Limited has completed the acquisition and registration of freehold industrial land in Gujarat on March 24, 2026. The acquired asset is industrial land measuring approximately 52,855 square meters located in Mouje Viroja, Taluka: Matar, in the Kheda district. The consideration for this acquisition was ₹5,81,40,500/-, excluding stamp duty and registration fees. This purchase is a continuation of the company's expansion efforts, following a prior disclosure on February 2, 2026.

announcements.subject: Amalgamation/Merger
announcements.detail: Board of Directors of Harind Chemicals and Pharmaceuticals Private Limited ( Harind ), a subsidiary of the Company, and Nova Surface-Care Centre Private Limited ( Nova ), a wholly-owned subsidiary of Harind, at their respective meetings held today i.e., Tuesday, 24th March 2026, have, inter alia, approved the Scheme of Amalgamation of Nova ( Transferor Company ) with Harind ("Transferee Company").
announcements.ai_summary: The Boards of Directors of Harind Chemicals and Pharmaceuticals Private Limited (Harind), a subsidiary of Asian Paints Limited, and Nova Surface-Care Centre Private Limited (Nova), a wholly-owned subsidiary of Harind, have approved a Scheme of Amalgamation. This scheme will see Nova, the Transferor Company, amalgamated with Harind, the Transferee Company. The approval was granted at their respective board meetings held on March 24, 2026. The amalgamation is not expected to materially impact the financials of Asian Paints Limited and is subject to regulatory approvals.

announcements.subject: Commencement of commercial production/operations
announcements.detail: Acme Solar Holdings Limited has informed the Exchange about Commissioning of second phase of 35.714 MW capacity of Battery Energy Storage System (BESS) Project at Jaimalsar, Bikaner, Rajasthan
announcements.ai_summary: Acme Solar Holdings Limited, through its wholly-owned subsidiary ACME Surya Power Private Limited, has commissioned the second phase of its Battery Energy Storage System (BESS) Project. This phase adds 35.714 MW / 160.48 MWh to the project located at Jaimalsar, Bikaner, Rajasthan. The total project capacity is 250 MW / 1103.392 MWh. This commissioning occurred on March 24, 2026, marking a significant step in the company's renewable energy infrastructure development.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: India Glycols Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Outcome of Court Convened Meeting of Unsecured Creditors along with Voting Results and Scruitiniser Report'.
announcements.ai_summary: India Glycols Limited has announced the outcome of a Court Convened Meeting of Unsecured Creditors held on March 24, 2026. This meeting was convened pursuant to orders from the Hon'ble National Company Law Tribunal, Allahabad Bench, dated January 15, 2026, and February 16, 2026. The company has submitted the gist of the proceedings, the voting results, and the consolidated scrutinizer's report, as required under Section 108 of the Companies Act, 2013. These documents, enclosed as Annexures A, B, and C, detail the decisions made by the unsecured creditors.

announcements.subject: Agreements
announcements.detail: Thomas Cook  (India)  Limited has informed the Exchange about Execution of Supplemental Agreement to Share Subscription cum Joint Venture Agreement.
announcements.ai_summary: Thomas Cook (India) Limited (TCIL) has executed a Supplemental Agreement to its Share Subscription cum Joint Venture Agreement with Atirath Technologies Private Limited. This agreement, approved by the Sub-Committee of the Board of Directors on March 24, 2026, concerns investment in Indian Horizon Marketing Services Limited (JV Co.) for the co-development of a Travel AI Platform. TCIL will maintain its 50% stake in the Joint Venture. This action is a continuation of the company's growth strategy and follows an intimation dated September 30, 2024. Investors should monitor the progress of the Travel AI Platform development.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Indian Bank has informed the Exchange about Allotment of Long Term Infrastructure Bonds aggregating upto Rs.5000 crore
announcements.ai_summary: Indian Bank has successfully raised Rs. 5,000 crore through the allotment of Long Term Infrastructure Bonds. The bonds are 7.15% Senior, Rated, Listed, Unsecured, Redeemable, Non-Convertible Bonds in the nature of Debentures, Series III, with ISIN INE562A08115. The issue opened and closed on March 23, 2026, on the BSE EBP Platform, and the allotment was made on March 24, 2026, to 04 allottees. Each bond has a face value of Rs. 1,00,000, and 5,00,000 such bonds were allotted. This private placement is a significant funding exercise for the bank.

announcements.subject: Granting/withdrawal/surrender/cancellation/suspension of key licenses/ regulatory approvals
announcements.detail: Emkay Global Financial Services Limited has informed the Exchanges about receipt of Trading approval letter for 2,78,300 Equity Shares having face value of Rs. 10/- each allotted at the price of Rs. 239.50/- (including premium of Rs. 229.50/-) per equity share pursuant to conversion of warrants issued on a preferential basis to the Promoter of the Company in terms of Chapter V of SEBI (ICDR) Regulations, 2018.
announcements.ai_summary: Emkay Global Financial Services Limited has received trading approval for 2,78,300 equity shares, each with a face value of Rs. 10. These shares were allotted at a price of Rs. 239.50 per share, including a premium of Rs. 229.50. This allotment is a consequence of the conversion of warrants issued on a preferential basis to the Promoter of the company, in accordance with Chapter V of SEBI (ICDR) Regulations, 2018. The announcement, dated March 24, 2026, confirms the successful conversion and subsequent trading approval. Investors should note the increase in the company's outstanding equity shares.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Sasken Technologies Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Sasken Technologies Limited has provided a general update to the exchange regarding business matters considered at its Board of Directors meeting held on March 24, 2026. The meeting, which took place from 6:30 PM to 7:00 PM, was conducted in compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. This announcement serves as a record of the board's deliberations on various business-related topics. No specific details regarding the nature of these business matters or any resulting decisions have been disclosed.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Sasken Technologies Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Outcome of Board Meeting held on March 24, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Sasken Technologies Limited held a Board of Directors meeting on March 24, 2026, from 6:30 PM to 7:00 PM. The company has informed the exchange about the outcome of this meeting, which was convened to consider business-related matters. As per Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, this disclosure is made for informational purposes. The specific details of the business matters discussed and any decisions made are not provided in this announcement. Investors will need to await further disclosures for specific outcomes from the board meeting.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Dr. Reddy's Laboratories Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Revised  Code of Practices and Procedures for Fair Disclosures of Un-published Price Sensitive Information.'
announcements.ai_summary: Dr. Reddy's Laboratories Limited has amended its 'Code of Practices and Procedures for Fair Disclosures of Un-published Price Sensitive Information'. The Board of Directors approved these revisions at their meeting held on March 24, 2026. This update is in accordance with Regulation 8(2) of the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015. The company has made the amended code available on its website for public access. Investors should review the updated code to understand the company's policies on the fair dissemination of material information. The specific changes to the code are not detailed in this announcement.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Inventurus Knowledge Solutions Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 24, 2026, titled "IKS Health and Certilytics Expand Strategic Collaboration to Bridge the Payer-Provider Gap with Agentic AI and Human-in-the-Loop Oversight."
announcements.ai_summary: Inventurus Knowledge Solutions Limited (IKS Health) and Certilytics, Inc. have expanded their strategic partnership to address the payer-provider gap using Agentic AI and human oversight. This collaboration aims to reduce administrative inefficiencies, improve member engagement, and enhance price transparency through a unified system. The announcement, made on March 24, 2026, details the ongoing efforts to bridge critical gaps in the healthcare ecosystem. Investors should monitor the impact of this expanded collaboration on IKS Health's operational efficiency and market positioning. The press release does not specify any new financial commitments or timelines for specific outcomes, focusing instead on the strategic intent of the partnership.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Mangalam Global Enterprise Limited has informed the Exchange about Approval/ No-objection letters received under Regulation 31A of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.
announcements.ai_summary: Mangalam Global Enterprise Limited has received approval/No-Objection letters from both the National Stock Exchange of India Limited and Bombay Stock Exchange Limited on March 24, 2026, for the reclassification of Radhika Bansal. This reclassification will move Radhika Bansal from the "Promoter Group" category to the "Public" category of the company. Radhika Bansal holds 10,00,000 shares, representing 0.30% of the total paid-up share capital. This approval is pursuant to Regulation 31A of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, following the company's application dated January 17, 2026.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Avenue Supermarts Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Redemption of Commercial Paper '.
announcements.ai_summary: Avenue Supermarts Limited has confirmed the full redemption of its Commercial Paper (CP) on its maturity date, March 24, 2026. The total amount redeemed was Rs. 200 Crores, represented by 4,000 Commercial Papers with ISIN INE192R14303. Following this redemption, the outstanding amount of this CP is now Nil. This action is in accordance with SEBI Master Circular No. SEBI/HO/DDHS/DDHS-PoD/P/CIR/2025/0000000137 dated October 15, 2025.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Spencer's Retail Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.
announcements.ai_summary: Spencer's Retail Limited's Nomination and Remuneration Committee has approved the grant of 1,20,000 stock options to eligible employees under the ‘Spencer’s Retail Employee Stock Option Plan 2019’. Each option is exercisable into one equity share. This grant is in accordance with the SEBI (Share Based Employee Benefits and Sweat Equity) Regulations, 2021, and the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The company has informed the stock exchanges about this development on March 24, 2026.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Tube Investments of India Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Grant of "No-objection" from Stock Exchanges for reclassification of M/s. Algavista Greentech Private Limited from"Promoter and Promoter Group Category" to "Public Category" '.
announcements.ai_summary: Tube Investments of India Limited has received "No-objection" letters from both the National Stock Exchange of India Limited (NSE) and BSE Limited (BSE) on March 24, 2026, for the reclassification of M/s. Algavista Greentech Private Limited. This reclassification will move Algavista Greentech Private Limited from the "Promoter and Promoter Group Category" to the "Public Category." This follows previous communications dated December 18, 2025, February 4, 2026, and February 5, 2026, regarding the company's application for this reclassification.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Mahindra & Mahindra Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Transfer of Equity Shares by Mahindra & Mahindra Employees  Stock Option Trust to the Stock Option Grantees'.
announcements.ai_summary: Mahindra & Mahindra Limited has completed the transfer of equity shares from the Mahindra & Mahindra Employees’ Stock Option Trust to the Stock Option Grantees on March 24, 2026. This action is in compliance with the undertaking provided to the stock exchanges at the time of listing the shares allotted to the Trust. The details of the Stock Option Grantees, to whom the shares have been transferred pursuant to the exercise of stock options granted under the Company’s Employees’ Stock Option Scheme, have been enclosed as Annexure I.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Jayant Agro Organics Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Announcement '.
announcements.ai_summary: Jayant Agro-Organics Limited has been honored with an award for being the "Second Highest Exporter of Castor Oil Derivatives from India for the year 2024–2025" by the Solvent Extractors’ Association of India. This recognition highlights the company's strong performance and leadership in the castor oil derivatives market. Jayant Agro-Organics Limited is a global leader in castor oil-based chemicals with over 70 years of experience in processing, sustainability, and value chain development.

announcements.company: ICICI Prudential Life Insurance Company Limited
announcements.subject: Action(s) initiated or orders passed
announcements.detail: ICICI Prudential Life Insurance Company Limited has informed the Exchange about Action(s) initiated or orders passed
announcements.ai_summary: ICICI Prudential Life Insurance Company Limited has received an order under Section 143(3) of the Income Tax Act, 1961, from the Assistant Commissioner of Income Tax, Central Circle 6(2), Mumbai, on March 23, 2026, at 9:05 PM, pertaining to Assessment Year 2024-25. The company intends to file an appeal against this order before the Commissioner of Income Tax (Appeals) within the stipulated timelines. Further details as required under Regulation 30(13) of the SEBI Listing Regulations are provided in Annexure A.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Sandur Manganese & Iron Ores Limited has informed the Exchange about Delisting Approval for Non-Convertible Debentures from BSE Limited
announcements.ai_summary: Sandur Manganese & Iron Ores Limited has received approval from BSE Limited for the delisting of its 11% secured, listed, redeemable Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs). This follows the company's earlier intimation on March 9, 2026, regarding the completion of early redemption of these NCDs prior to their maturity date. A total of 45,000 NCDs were approved for delisting.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Pasupati Acrylon Limited has informed the Exchange about temporary shut down of plant operations
announcements.ai_summary: Pasupati Acrylon Limited has temporarily shut down its Acrylic Fiber plant operations from March 24, 2026, until the first half of April 2026. This shutdown is due to a delay in the shipment of raw materials, estimated to be between 15-20 days, caused by the ongoing war in the Middle East region and subsequent logistics disruptions. The company will inform the stock exchanges once manufacturing operations resume, which is dependent on the arrival of the raw material vessel.

announcements.subject: Change in Auditors
announcements.detail: Lexus Granito (India) Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Change in Auditors of the company.
announcements.ai_summary: Lexus Granito (India) Limited has announced a change in its auditors. The Board of Directors, in their meeting held on March 24, 2026, approved the appointment of M/s. Jitendra Parmar & Associates (FRN: S2023GJ903900) as the new Secretarial Auditor for the Financial Year 2025-26. Concurrently, the Board noted the resignation of M/s. M. R. Bhatia & Co. (FRN: S2018GJ651400) as the Secretarial Auditor, effective March 24, 2026. The resignation letter from M/s. M. R. Bhatia & Co. confirmed no concerns regarding the company's management.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Lexus Granito (India) Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Outcome of Board Meeting held on March 24, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Lexus Granito (India) Limited's Board of Directors convened on March 24, 2026, at the company's registered office in Morbi, Gujarat. The meeting, which ran from 4:00 PM to 5:00 PM, resulted in the approval of the appointment of M/s. Jitendra Parmar & Associates as the Company's Secretarial Auditor for the Financial Year 2025-26. The Board also noted the resignation of M/s. M. R. Bhatia & Co. as Secretarial Auditor, effective March 24, 2026. No concerns were raised by the resigning auditor.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Vishal Mega Mart Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Vishal Mega Mart Limited has received an order from the Assistant Commissioner, LGSTO 38 - Bengaluru, DGSTO -5, Bengaluru, Karnataka. The company has provided detailed information regarding this order as required under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, in an enclosed annexure. The company has informed the National Stock Exchange of India Ltd. and BSE Limited about this development.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Diffusion Engineers Limited has informed the Exchange regarding ' Post- Intimation Of Investor Meet And Plant Visit With Nirbhay Investment Opportunities Fund On Tuesday, 24th March, 2026.'.
announcements.ai_summary: Diffusion Engineers Limited held an investor meet and plant visit on Tuesday, March 24, 2026, with Nirbhay Investment Opportunities Fund. The company has confirmed that no Un-Published Price Sensitive Information (UPSI) was shared during this engagement. This event was conducted in compliance with Regulation 30(6) of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. Investors can find more details on the company's website at https://diffusionengineers.com/.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: PG Electroplast Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Outcome of Board Meeting held on March 24, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: PG Electroplast Limited's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on March 24, 2026, approved the draft Postal Ballot Notice for shareholders. The notice will seek approval for the reappointment of Mr. Ram Dayal Modi (DIN:03047117) as an Independent Director for a second five-year term from May 26, 2026, and his continuation after age 75. It also seeks approval for the reappointment of Mrs. Ruchika Bansal (DIN:06505221) as an Independent Director for a second five-year term from August 14, 2026. The Postal Ballot Notice will be sent to shareholders and stock exchanges in due course. This is in accordance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.company: Indian Railway Catering And Tourism Corporation Limited
announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Indian Railway Catering And Tourism Corporation Limited has informed the Exchange about  i. Board Comments on fines levied by the Exchanges for the quarter ended 31st December, 2025; and ii. Change in the nomination of Chief Investor Relations Officer (CIRO).
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Indian Railway Catering And Tourism Corporation Limited, in its meeting held on March 24, 2026, has considered and commented on fines levied by the Exchanges for the quarter ended December 31, 2025. The company was fined ₹5,42,200 by NSE and BSE for non-compliance with Regulation 17(1) of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015, specifically regarding board composition and the failure to appoint a woman director. The Board noted that the non-compliance was beyond the company's control. Additionally, a change in the nomination of the Chief Investor Relations Officer (CIRO) was also discussed.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: DCW Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: DCW Limited has disclosed the receipt of an Income Tax Demand Order. The relevant details pertaining to this order are provided in the enclosed Annexure, in accordance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, read with SEBI Circular SEBI/ HO/ 49/14/14(7)2025-CFD-POD2/I/3762/2026 dated January 30, 2026.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Happy Forgings Limited has informed the Exchange regarding ''.'Reporting of violation under SEBI (PIT) Regulations , 2015"
announcements.ai_summary: Happy Forgings Limited is submitting an intimation regarding a violation under SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, concerning the Company’s Code of Conduct for Insider Trading. This report is submitted as per Annexure-A prescribed under SEBI Master Circular No. SEBI/HO/ISD/ISD-PoD-2/P/CIR/2023/039 dated March 23, 2023. The company is reporting this violation in its capacity as a Listed Company.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Wipro Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Grant of Restricted Stock Units'.
announcements.ai_summary: Wipro Limited has granted 532,407 ADS Restricted Stock Units and 10,664 Restricted Stock Units under its Employee Stock Options, Performance Stock Unit and Restricted Stock Unit Scheme 2024 to identified employees, effective March 24, 2026. These units will vest according to the schedule approved by the Nomination and Remuneration Committee and can be exercised within the period approved by the Committee.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Gujarat State Fertilizers & Chemicals Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Amendment to the Code of Practices and Procedures for Fair Disclosure of Unpublished Price Sensitive Information'.
announcements.ai_summary: Gujarat State Fertilizers & Chemicals Limited's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on March 24, 2026, approved amendments to the Code of Practices and Procedures for Fair Disclosure of Unpublished Price Sensitive Information. These amendments are intended to align the code with recent changes in the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015. The amended code is available on the company's website at www.gstblimited.com and is enclosed for reference, as per Regulation 8(2) of the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Amendment(s)
announcements.detail: Awfis Space Solutions Limited has informed the Exchange about Disclosure of material events / information by listed entities under Regulations 30 of Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.
announcements.ai_summary: Awfis Space Solutions Limited has executed an addendum to the Business Transfer Agreement (BTA) with Awfis Transform Private Limited (ATPL), the purchaser, on March 24, 2026. This addendum pertains to the determination of the final consideration for the Business Undertaking, referred to as the "Final Purchase Price," based on an updated valuation report. This disclosure follows previous announcements on November 11, 2025, December 23, 2025, January 23, 2026, and February 26, 2026, and is made under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Acquisition
announcements.detail: Shakti Pumps (India) Limited has informed the Exchange that Company has invested Rs. 5.00 Crores in its wholly owned subsidiary i.e. Shakti Energy Solutions Limited.
announcements.ai_summary: Shakti Pumps (India) Limited has invested Rs. 5 crore in its wholly owned subsidiary, Shakti Energy Solutions Limited (SESL). This capital infusion is for establishing a greenfield high-efficiency Solar DCR cell and Solar PV modules manufacturing plant in Pithampur, Madhya Pradesh, with a production capacity of 2.20 GW. The disclosure is made under Regulation 30(6) read with Schedule III Part A Para A(1) of the Listing Regulations and SEBI Circular SEBI/HO/CFD/CFD-1/CIR/2023/123 dated July 13, 2023.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Initiation of Anti-Dumping Duty Absorption Review
announcements.ai_summary: OCCL Limited has been informed that the Directorate General of Trade Remedies (DGTR), Ministry of Commerce and Industry, Government of India, has initiated an anti-dumping duty absorption review. This review, initiated on March 20, 2026, and notified on March 24, 2026, concerns imports of "Insoluble Sulphur" originating from China PR. The initiation is pursuant to an application filed by OCCL Limited, alleging absorption of existing anti-dumping duties. This disclosure is made under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts
announcements.detail: Magellanic Cloud Limited has informed the Exchange about Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts
announcements.ai_summary: Provigil Surveillance Limited, a wholly-owned subsidiary of Magellanic Cloud Limited, has secured a Purchase Order valued at over ₹25 Crore from Punjab & Sind Bank. This order involves the deployment of AI-enabled surveillance solutions across approximately 930 ATM/CRM sites. The solutions aim to enhance real-time monitoring, threat detection, and operational efficiency for the bank's network. This significant order was disclosed by Magellanic Cloud Limited on March 24, 2026, under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Magellanic Cloud Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Magellanic Cloud Limited's Board of Directors, in their meeting on March 24, 2026, has authorized Key Managerial Personnel (KMP) to severally determine the materiality of events or information and disclose them to the stock exchanges. The authorized KMPs include Mr. Joseph Sudheer Reddy Thumma (Managing Director), Mr. Pratik Harish Bhai Bhatt (Chief Financial Officer), and Mr. Sameer Lalwani (Company Secretary & Compliance Officer). This authorization is in accordance with Regulation 30(5) of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Magellanic Cloud Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Outcome of Board Meeting held on March 24, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Magellanic Cloud Limited's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on March 24, 2026, approved participation in the Rights Issue of its subsidiary, Scandron Private Limited (SPL). The company has accepted an offer to subscribe to up to 56,00,000 equity shares of SPL at an issue price of ₹100 per share. This subscription could aggregate to an amount not exceeding ₹56,00,00,000 (Rupees Fifty-Six Crore). The final number of shares and investment amount will be determined at the time of subscription based on commercial considerations. The meeting commenced at 3:00 PM and concluded at 3:43 PM.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Larsen & Toubro Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Amalgamation of SiliConch Systems Private Limited, a step-down subsidiary of the Company with L&T Semiconductor Technologies Limited a wholly owned subsidiary'.
announcements.ai_summary: Larsen & Toubro Limited (L&T) has completed the amalgamation of SiliConch Systems Private Limited (SSPL) with L&T Semiconductor Technologies Limited (LTSCT). SSPL was a wholly-owned subsidiary of LTSCT, which is itself a wholly-owned subsidiary of L&T. The Scheme of Amalgamation was approved by the Regional Director, Western Region, Ministry of Corporate Affairs, on March 13, 2026. The Appointed Date for the amalgamation was August 10, 2025, and the effective date, upon filing with the Registrar of Companies, is March 24, 2026.

announcements.company: The New India Assurance Company Limited
announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: The New India Assurance Company Limited has informed the Exchange about Disclosure under Reg 30 of SEBI LODR
announcements.ai_summary: The New India Assurance Company Limited has received an Assessment Order from the Income Tax Department for Assessment Year 2023-24. The order, passed under Section 143(3), specifies an amount of ₹9,37,08,470. The company intends to pursue an appeal before the National Faceless Appeal Centre (NFAC) or explore other legal options against this order. This disclosure is made on March 24, 2026, in compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Bharat Petroleum Corporation Limited has informed the Exchange regarding ' commissioning of 2G Bioethanol Refinery'.
announcements.ai_summary: Bharat Petroleum Corporation Limited (BPCL) has successfully commissioned its Second-Generation (2G) Bioethanol Refinery at Bargarh. This new facility will produce 100 KL/day of fuel-grade bioethanol from rice straw using advanced lignocellulosic technology. The plant is designed as a Zero Liquid Discharge (ZLD) facility, ensuring efficient resource utilization and environmental protection. This commissioning supports India's E20 Ethanol Blending Programme and its national energy goals. The company announced this update on March 24, 2026.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Bharat Petroleum Corporation Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 24, 2026, titled "BPCL and Sembcorp JV (NeuEn Green Energy) secures 10KTPA Green Hydrogen Contract from Numaligarh Refinery".
announcements.ai_summary: Bharat Petroleum Corporation Limited (BPCL) has announced that its joint venture with Sembcorp, NeuEn Green Energy Pvt. Ltd. (NeuEN), has secured a 10KTPA Green Hydrogen Contract from Numaligarh Refinery. This significant milestone in India's clean energy transition was communicated via a press release dated March 24, 2026, and submitted to the stock exchanges as per Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations & Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Acquisition
announcements.detail: Completion of acquisition of IANS India Private Limited
announcements.ai_summary: Adani Enterprises Limited has announced the completion of the acquisition of the balance stake in IANS India Private Limited by its wholly owned subsidiary, AMG Media Networks Limited (AMNL). This follows the execution of a share purchase agreement (SPA) on January 22, 2026. AMNL has acquired the remaining 24% Category I shares and 0.74% Category II shares in IANS. Consequently, IANS India Private Limited has now become a wholly owned step-down subsidiary of Adani Enterprises Limited.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Quess Corp Limited has informed the Exchange about 'Allotment of equity shares under the Quess Stock Ownership Plan-2020'
announcements.ai_summary: The Nomination and Remuneration Committee of Quess Corp Limited, in a meeting held on March 24, 2026, approved the exercise of Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) and the allotment of 1,13,847 equity shares of Rs. 10 each under the Quess Stock Ownership Plan 2020 (QSOP 2020). These shares will rank pari-passu with existing equity shares. Following this allotment, the company's paid-up share capital has increased from 14,92,17,607 equity shares aggregating to Rs. 1,49,21,76,070 to 14,93,31,454 equity shares aggregating to Rs. 1,49,33,14,540.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: NTPC Green Energy Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 24, 2026, titled "Press Release regarding NTPC Green Energy Limited inks MoU with Nxtra Data Limited for development of RE Projects."
announcements.ai_summary: NTPC Green Energy Limited has announced a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with Nxtra Data Limited for the development of Renewable Energy (RE) projects. This announcement was made via a press release dated March 24, 2026. The details of the MoU were submitted to the National Stock Exchange of India Limited and BSE Limited for information and records, in compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Dev Accelerator Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Outcome of Board Meeting held on March 24, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Dev Accelerator Limited's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on March 24, 2026, approved the issuance of up to 33,33,330 warrants. Each warrant is convertible into one fully paid-up equity share of face value Rs. 2 at a price of Rs. 45 per share, payable in cash. This preferential issue aims to raise an aggregate of up to Rs. 14,99,99,850. The warrants can be exercised in one or more tranches within 18 months from the allotment date. The recipients of these warrants are promoters Mr. Shah Parth Naimeshbhai, Mr. Uttamchandani Umesh Satishkumar, and Mr. Rushit Shardulkumar Shah.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Vital Chemtech Limited has informed the Exchange about Grant of stock options under Vital Employee Stock Option Scheme-2025.
