Following this acquisition, Apollo Hospitals' effective shareholding in AHLL has increased to 99.42%.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Jeena Sikho Lifecare Limited Has Informed the Exchange About Publication of Case Study and Case Reports.
announcements.ai_summary: Jeena Sikho Lifecare Limited has announced the publication of academic case studies and case reports in the "International Journal of Advanced Research (IJAR)". These publications, authored by medical professionals associated with the company, including its Managing Director and senior consultants, highlight the company's commitment to Ayurvedic research and evidence-based clinical practice.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Bharti Airtel Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 23, 2026, titled "Airtel brings faster speeds and wider 5G coverage to millions in Gujarat with 2,750+ new sites".
announcements.ai_summary: Bharti Airtel Limited has issued a press release announcing the deployment of over 2,750 new 5G sites across Gujarat in the last 12 months. This expansion aims to provide faster speeds, wider coverage, and an improved network experience for millions of customers in 36 districts.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Hindustan Zinc Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 23, 2026, titled "Hindustan Zinc and Tata Steel Partner to Scale Low-Carbon ZincSolutions with EcoZen".
announcements.ai_summary: Hindustan Zinc Limited and Tata Steel are partnering to scale low-carbon zinc solutions with a product called EcoZen. This collaboration aims to reduce value-chain emissions, as EcoZen offers over 75% lower carbon intensity than conventional zinc. The partnership builds on a long-standing relationship supporting critical infrastructure projects.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Update regarding Investment in the share capital of Wholly Owned Subsidiary of the company
announcements.ai_summary: Transrail Lighting Limited has recalled share application money remitted for its wholly-owned subsidiary, Transrail Trading LLC in the UAE. This decision was made due to the current war-like situation.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: COMPLIANCE WITH REGULATION 30 OF SEBI (LODR) REGULATIONS, 2015 - FUNDING OF  06TH SEMI ANNUAL INTEREST PAYMENT IN ESCROW ACCOUNT MAINTAINED IN BANK OF INDIA WRT MTNL BOND SERIES VII E (INE153A08147)
announcements.ai_summary: Mahanagar Telephone Nigam Limited has funded the 6th semi-annual interest payment for its MTNL Bond Series VII E (INE153A08147) into an escrow account maintained with Bank of India. The funding was completed on March 21, 2026, for the interest payment due on March 24, 2026.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Mangal Credit and Fincorp Limited has informed the Exchange about Allotment of 3,000 Non Convertible Debentures on Private Placement basis.
announcements.ai_summary: Mangal Credit and Fincorp Limited has approved the allotment of 3,000 Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) on a private placement basis. Each NCD has a face value of INR 1,00,000 and was issued at INR 98,000.

announcements.subject: Disclosure under SEBI Takeover Regulations
announcements.detail: Hari Shanker Khemka For and on behalf of Hari Khemka Business Family Trust has Submitted to the Exchange a copy of Disclosure under Regulation 10 (5) of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.
announcements.ai_summary: Hari Shanker Khemka, on behalf of the Hari Khemka Business Family Trust, has submitted a disclosure under Regulation 10(5) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. This filing relates to a substantial acquisition of shares and takeovers.

announcements.subject: Disclosure under SEBI Takeover Regulations
announcements.detail: Urvashi Tilakdhar has Submitted to the Exchange a copy of Disclosure under Regulation 10 (5) of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.
announcements.ai_summary: Urvashi Tilakdhar has submitted a disclosure under Regulation 10 (5) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. This filing relates to substantial acquisition of shares and takeovers.

announcements.subject: Disclosure under SEBI Takeover Regulations
announcements.detail: Urvashi Tilakdhar has Submitted to the Exchange a copy of Disclosure under Regulation 10 (5) of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.
announcements.ai_summary: Urvashi Tilakdhar has submitted a disclosure under Regulation 10 (5) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. This filing relates to substantial acquisition of shares and takeovers.

announcements.subject: Disclosure under SEBI Takeover Regulations
announcements.detail: Akshay Dhar has Submitted to the Exchange a copy of Disclosure under Regulation 10 (5) of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.
announcements.ai_summary: Akshay Dhar has submitted a disclosure under Regulation 10 (5) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. This filing relates to substantial acquisition of shares and takeovers.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Allied Blenders and Distillers Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 23, 2026, titled "ICONiQ White Whisky Makes History: World s Fastest Growing MillionaireSpirits Brand Crosses 10 Million Cases Milestone.".
announcements.ai_summary: Allied Blenders and Distillers Limited has issued a press release announcing that its ICONiQ White Whisky has crossed the 10 million cases milestone. The brand is described as the world's fastest-growing millionaire spirits brand. The press release is dated March 23, 2026.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Shalby Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Inaugurationof Oncology Department along with advanced Radiotherapy facilities at Krishna Shalby Hospital'.
announcements.ai_summary: Shalby Limited has inaugurated an Oncology Department with advanced Radiotherapy facilities at Krishna Shalby Hospital in Ahmedabad. This expansion aims to provide comprehensive, integrated cancer care under one roof. The department is equipped with advanced technology and an experienced team of oncologists for specialized diagnosis and treatment.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Gudhi Padwa sales update for the Financial Year 2025-2026.
announcements.ai_summary: PNGS Reva Diamond Jewellery Limited reported a significant increase in Gudhi Padwa sales for FY 2025-2026, reaching Rs. 73.004 million. This represents a 2.51 times year-on-year growth compared to Rs. 20.818 million in the previous year's Gudhi Padwa sales.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Vintage Coffee And Beverages Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 23, 2026, titled "Commencement of commercial production of 4,500 MTPA".
announcements.ai_summary: Vintage Coffee And Beverages Limited announced the commencement of commercial production for an additional 4,500 MTPA capacity on March 23, 2026. This brownfield expansion for soluble coffee is located at a wholly-owned subsidiary's facility near Rachur Village, Telangana, increasing the company's total installed production capacity.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Euro Pratik Sales Limited has informed the Exchange about Acquisition of Chawla Brothers
announcements.ai_summary: Euro Pratik Sales Limited's Board of Directors approved the acquisition of a 51% stake in Chawla Brothers, a partnership firm based in Jalandhar and Ludhiana. The total investment for this acquisition amounts to Rs. 32.20 crore.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: IFGL Refractories Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: IFGL Refractories Limited has resumed operations at its Kandla manufacturing facility in Gujarat. The facility, located at Plot Nos. 638-644, Kandla Special Economic Zone, had been impacted by Liquified Petroleum Gas (LPG) supply issues. All product lines at the Kandla works are now functional.

announcements.subject: Action(s) initiated or orders passed
announcements.detail: Kokuyo Camlin Limited has informed the Exchange about Action(s) initiated or orders passed
announcements.ai_summary: Kokuyo Camlin Limited has received an order from the DS Income Tax assessment unit, National faceless unit, India. The order pertains to a demand for Income Tax along with interest and penalty, issued under sections 147/143(3) read with section 144B of the Income Tax Act, 1961. The company received this communication on March 21, 2025.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Adani Green Energy Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Operationalization of Projects'.
announcements.ai_summary: Adani Green Energy Limited (AGEL) has operationalized an aggregate of 510.1 MW power projects at Khavda, Gujarat, through its stepdown subsidiaries. This commissioning has increased AGEL’s total operational renewable generation capacity to 17,982.3 MW. The decision to operationalize these plants and commence power generation was made on March 22, 2026.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: P N Gadgil Jewellers Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Store opening'.
announcements.ai_summary: P N Gadgil Jewellers Limited has opened two new stores on March 22, 2026. One store is located at The Nextation Building, Kolhapur, Maharashtra, and the other is a Franchise Owned, Company Operated (FOCO) model store in Ghatkopar East, Mumbai. Following these openings, the company's total store count has reached 75.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Jtekt India Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Jtekt India Limited has received an Assessment Order from the Office of the Income Tax Authority. The company has provided the requisite information as per Schedule III under Regulation 30 of the Listing Regulations. This update is for the record.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Goa Carbon Limited has informed the Exchange about the temporary shut-down of the Company's Paradeep Unit for scheduled maintenance work.
announcements.ai_summary: Goa Carbon Limited has temporarily shut down its Paradeep Unit for scheduled maintenance work. The unit is located at Vill. Udayabata, Paradeepgarh, Dist. Jagatsinghpur, Odisha. The shutdown commenced on March 22, 2026.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Kirloskar Industries Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Update of Kirloskar Ferrous Industries Limited (KFIL), a listed material subsidiary of the Company'.
announcements.ai_summary: Kirloskar Industries Limited has informed the exchange about an update from its material subsidiary, Kirloskar Ferrous Industries Limited (KFIL). KFIL, a listed entity, has filed an intimation with the stock exchanges where its shares are listed. A copy of KFIL's intimation is enclosed for reference.

announcements.subject: Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts
announcements.detail: RITES Limited has informed the Exchange about Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts
announcements.ai_summary: RITES Limited has received a Letter of Acceptance from Research Designs and Standards Organisation (RDSO), Lucknow. The contract is for the comprehensive maintenance of a dedicated test track between Gudha and Thathana Mithri stations in the Jodhpur division of NWR.

announcements.subject: Amanta Healthcare Ltd - 544502 - Open Market Purchase Of Equity Shares By Immediate Relative Of Director
announcements.detail: We would like to inform you that we have received disclosure in Form C, pursuant to Regulation 7(2) of SEBI (PIT) Regulations, 2015 from Immediate Relative of Director.
announcements.ai_summary: Amanta Healthcare Limited has received a disclosure in Form C from Ms. Dympal Jain, an immediate relative of Director Shri Nitin Jain. Ms. Jain made an open market purchase of 15,675 equity shares of the Company. This transaction occurred between March 19, 2026, and March 24, 2026. The disclosure is made pursuant to Regulation 7(2) of the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: LTIMindtree Ltd - 540005 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Intimation attached
announcements.ai_summary: LTM Limited has issued a press release titled “LTM Positioned as a Leader in ISG’s Provider LensTM Evaluation for Oracle Cloud and Technology Ecosystem 2025”. The press release highlights LTM's leadership across key quadrants in both the United States and Europe for Oracle Cloud and Technology Ecosystem. This recognition underscores LTM's capabilities as a Business Creativity partner for large enterprises. The company has submitted this press release for public dissemination and record-keeping.

announcements.subject: Bikaji Foods International Ltd - 543653 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Updates on Acquisition
announcements.detail: Additional Acquisition of Stake by Bikaji Foods Retail Limited (Wholly-Owned Subsidiary of the Company) in Hazelnut Factory Food Products Private Limited
announcements.ai_summary: Bikaji Foods Retail Limited (BFRL), a wholly-owned subsidiary of Bikaji Foods International Limited, has completed the second tranche of its acquisition in Hazelnut Factory Food Products Private Limited (THF). BFRL has acquired an additional 8.59% stake in THF. This acquisition is a continuation of previous stake purchases, as detailed in earlier communications dated October 16, 2024, and October 26, 2024. The company is providing this update as per Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Aadhar Housing Finance Ltd - 544176 - Intimation About Payment Of Interest And Redemption Amount On Non-Convertible Debentures Of The Company
announcements.detail: Intimation about payment of interest and redemption amount on Non-Convertible Debentures of the Company
announcements.ai_summary: Aadhar Housing Finance Limited has provided an update regarding the payment of yearly interest and redemption amount for its Non-Convertible Debentures (ISIN - INE538L07270). The due date for this payment was March 31, 2026. However, as March 31, 2026, is a bank holiday, the payment will be made on the preceding working day, March 30, 2026. This action is in accordance with the SEBI Master Circular dated October 15, 2025.

announcements.subject: Bharat Dynamics Ltd - 541143 - General Updates On Advanced  Akash Weapon Systems
announcements.detail: General updates on Advanced Akash Weapon Systems
announcements.ai_summary: Bharat Dynamics Limited (BDL) has successfully completed the First-off Production Model (FOPM) of the Advanced Akash Weapon System. This upgraded system incorporates enhanced sub-systems, which will improve performance and bolster the combat capabilities of the Indian Armed Forces. The system demonstrated high precision against various aerial threats, highlighting BDL's expertise in delivering complex defense systems. The completion of the FOPM is expected to pave the way for the commencement of deliveries of these Advanced Akash Weapon Systems to the Indian armed forces shortly.

announcements.subject: Sammaan Capital Ltd - 535789 - Compliances-Reg. 57 (1) - Certificate of interest payment/Principal in case of NCD
announcements.detail:
We hereby certify that our Company has made timely payment of principal and interest amount in respect of the Secured Redeemable NCDs issued by our Company through Public Issue and listed on the Stock Exchanges.

Refer attached PDF for more details.
announcements.ai_summary: Sammaan Capital Limited has certified that it has made timely payments of both principal and interest amounts on its Secured Redeemable Non-Convertible Debentures. These debentures were issued through a Public Issue and are listed on the stock exchanges. This certification is provided in compliance with Regulation 57 of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The company confirms adherence to its financial obligations regarding these NCDs.

announcements.subject: Pace Digitek Ltd - 544550 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Intimation of receipt of Letter of acceptance of purchase order
announcements.ai_summary: Pace Digitek Limited has received a Letter of Acceptance from North Western Railway for the provision of Lattice Towers. This order is in connection with UHF/LTE & KAVACH Work over balance routes of the Jodhpur division of North Western Railway, covering 996.24 KM. The total value of the accepted purchase order is Rs. 226.42 Million, inclusive of GST. This disclosure is made pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Ester Industries Ltd - 500136 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of The Board Meeting Held On 26Th March 2026
announcements.detail: Outcome of the Board Meeting held on 26th March 2026
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Ester Industries Limited held a meeting on March 26, 2026. During this meeting, Mr. Arvind Singhania was re-designated from Managing Director to Non-Executive Non-Independent Director and Chairman of the Board, effective from the close of business hours on March 26, 2026, subject to shareholder approval. Additionally, Mr. Vaibhav Jha was appointed as the Chief Executive Officer of the Company, effective March 27, 2026. The Board also approved the issuance of a Notice of Postal Ballot to seek approval from the Company's Members for these changes.

announcements.subject: Cryogenic Ogs Ltd - 544440 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: We are please to inform you that the Company has received Letter of Intent from Emerson Measurement Systems and Solutions (India) Private Limited amounting to Rs. 5,54,79,894/-.
announcements.ai_summary: The company has received a Letter of Intent from Emerson Measurement Systems and Solutions (India) Private Limited for the supply of a fully integrated Metering Skid. The total value of this order is ₹5,54,79,894, including GST. This announcement is made in accordance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The company is expected to commence delivery of the ordered goods shortly.

announcements.company: Anzen India Energy Yield Plus Trust
announcements.subject: Anzen India Energy Yield Plus Trust - 543655 - Reg 23(5)(i): Disclosure of material issue
announcements.detail: Anzen India Energy Yield Plus Trust has informed the Exchange regarding Disclosure of material issue
announcements.ai_summary: Anzen India Energy Yield Plus Trust has reported a transaction under the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015. This sale is disclosed as per Regulation 7(2) read with Regulation 6(2) of the PIT Regulations. The company has enclosed the disclosure received from SEPL Energy Private Limited for the records of the stock exchanges.

announcements.subject: Fedbank Financial Services Ltd - 544027 - Intimation Of Conference Meeting Held On March 25, 2026
announcements.detail: Intimation of Conference Meeting held on March 25, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Fedbank Financial Services Ltd has informed the stock exchanges about its participation in a conference meeting held on March 25, 2026, in Mumbai. The meeting commenced at 04:15 PM and concluded at 05:50 PM. This disclosure is made pursuant to the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. A list of company officials who participated in the meeting is provided as an annexure, and the same has been uploaded to the company's website. Fedbank Financial Services Ltd has explicitly stated that no unpublished price-sensitive information was shared during this meeting.

announcements.subject: BLB Ltd - 532290 - Disclosure - SEBI (PIT) Regulations
announcements.detail: Please find attached Disclosure dated March 26, 2026 under SEBI (PIT) Regulations
announcements.ai_summary: BLB Ltd has submitted a disclosure under Regulation 7(2) of the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, in Form C. This disclosure was received from Sh. Brij Rattan Bagri, who is a Promoter and Director of the company, on March 26, 2026. The form details changes in his shareholding. The disclosure pertains to securities acquired or disposed of by the promoter and director. The company has requested that this information be taken on record.

announcements.subject: Le Travenues Technology Ltd - 544192 - Media Release - Abhibus And Fleetx Partner To Bring AI-Powered Safety & Fleet Intelligence To Buses
announcements.detail: AbhiBus and Fleetx Partner to Bring AI-Powered Safety & Fleet Intelligence to Buses
announcements.ai_summary: Le Travenues Technology Ltd announced on March 26, 2026, a partnership between its bus business, AbhiBus, and Fleetx. This collaboration aims to bring AI-powered safety and fleet intelligence solutions to buses. AbhiBus, a leading online bus ticketing platform, will integrate advanced video telematics and driver safety solutions from Fleetx, an AI-driven fleet intelligence platform, across its bus operator network. This initiative is intended to enhance passenger safety, improve operational visibility, and increase driver accountability. The media release is enclosed and filed in compliance with SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Exicom Tele-Systems Ltd - 544133 - Extension Of Timeline For Utilization Of Unutilized IPO Proceeds Up To September 30, 2026.
announcements.detail: Exicom has informed the exchange regarding " Extension of timeline for utilization of unutilized IPO proceeds up to September 30, 2026."
announcements.ai_summary: Exicom Tele-Systems Ltd announced on March 26, 2026, an extension of the timeline for the utilization of unutilized Initial Public Offering (IPO) proceeds. The Board of Directors, through a circular resolution, approved extending the utilization deadline for a portion of the IPO proceeds up to September 30, 2026. As of December 31, 2025, ₹381.34 crores had been utilized, with an additional ₹9.18 crores utilized in Q4 FY 2025-26. An amount of ₹8.83 crores remains unutilized for Research & Development (R&D), and its utilization timeline has now been extended. This disclosure is made pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Precision Camshafts Ltd - 539636 - SE Intimation Regarding The Partial Disruption Of The Operations At Solapur Plant.
announcements.detail: The Company wishes to inform stock exchange about the partial disruption of operations at the plant located at Solapur.
announcements.ai_summary: Precision Camshafts Ltd informed the stock exchanges on March 26, 2026, about a partial disruption of operations at its Solapur plant. The disruption is due to the supply of Liquefied Petroleum Gas (LPG) being affected by global energy supply chain issues linked to the Middle East conflict. The company is actively working with suppliers to secure LPG and avoid a complete production shutdown, but the situation remains critical due to extreme scarcity. Necessary updates will be provided as the situation evolves. This intimation is made pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: RateGain Travel Technologies Ltd - 543417 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: As enclosed.
announcements.ai_summary: RateGain Travel Technologies Limited announced on March 26, 2026, a partnership with Cashfree Payments. This collaboration positions Cashfree Payments as a Platinum Partner for RateGain's RG Pay product, enabling local payment acceptance for global travel brands. The partnership aims to enhance payment solutions for the travel industry. This announcement is made in accordance with Regulation 30 read with Schedule III of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The press release detailing this partnership has been enclosed.

announcements.subject: Indusind Bank Ltd - 532187 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Please find attached herewith the captioned intimation.
announcements.ai_summary: IndusInd Bank Limited announced on March 26, 2026, the launch of its Capital Gains Account Scheme (CGAS). This scheme allows customers to park long-term capital gains until they are reinvested, thereby availing tax exemptions as per the Income-tax Act, 1961. The bank has issued a press release detailing this new offering, which is also available on its website. This announcement is made in compliance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Brigade Enterprises Ltd - 532929 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Brigade Group Launches Brigade Lumina in Bengaluru with a Revenue Potential of over Rs. 700 Crores
announcements.ai_summary: Brigade Enterprises Ltd announced on March 26, 2026, the launch of its new residential project, Brigade Lumina, located in Northwest Bengaluru on Tumkur Main Road. This project is a net-zero carbon development spread across 4.11 acres. The estimated revenue potential for Brigade Lumina is over ₹700 crores. The project will offer two and three-bedroom units with sizes ranging from approximately 1100 to 1800 square feet. This disclosure is made pursuant to Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, and a press release has been enclosed and hosted on the company's website.

announcements.subject: Happiest Minds Technologies Ltd - 543227 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Happiest Minds and Unifyapps Announce Strategic Partnership to Accelerate Enterprise AI Adoption
announcements.ai_summary: Happiest Minds Technologies Limited announced on March 26, 2026, a strategic partnership with UnifyApps. This collaboration aims to accelerate the adoption of Artificial Intelligence (AI) within enterprises. The partnership will leverage the strengths of both companies to offer advanced AI solutions. Further details of this strategic alliance, including the specific technologies or services to be jointly offered and the scope of the collaboration, are provided in the press release. This announcement is made in compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The press release was issued from Bengaluru, Seattle, and London.

announcements.subject: Maharashtra Scooters Ltd - 500266 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Acquisition
announcements.detail: Acquisition of shares of Bajaj Finance Limited and Bajaj Auto Limited
announcements.ai_summary: Maharashtra Scooters Ltd has disclosed details regarding the acquisition of shares in Bajaj Finance Limited and Bajaj Auto Limited. The announcement, made on March 26, 2026, refers to Annexure 1 & 2 for specific details as required under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. Further information regarding the transaction, including the number of shares acquired, the price per share, and the total consideration, is expected to be detailed in these annexures. The company has submitted this disclosure to both BSE Limited and the National Stock Exchange of India Ltd. Investors should refer to the attached annexures for precise figures and terms of the acquisition.

announcements.subject: Hindustan Media Ventures Ltd - 533217 - Disclosure Regarding Ottplay Business Of The Company
announcements.detail: Disclosure regarding OTTplay business of the Company is enclosed
announcements.ai_summary: Hindustan Media Ventures Ltd announced on March 26, 2026, that it will cease offering new OTTplay subscription packs from March 31, 2026. However, existing subscribers to the OTTplay platform will continue to receive support. This decision was made by the Board of Directors of the Company. The relevant details concerning this business decision are enclosed as Annexure I and have also been uploaded to the company's website, www.hmvl.in.

announcements.subject: Diamines & Chemicals Ltd-$ - 500120 - Disclosure  Under Regulation 29(2) Of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition Of Shares And Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 Received

announcements.subject: Wealth First Portfolio Managers Ltd - 544536 - Intimation Of Receipt Of SEBI Mutual Fund License In Subsidiary Company.

This approval, dated March 25, 2026, follows an earlier intimation on May 8, 2025. The company is requested to take this information on record and display it on the stock exchange notice board.

The total value of this order is Rs. 35,43,99,930. This announcement is made pursuant to Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. Further details regarding this award are provided in Annexure A.

announcements.subject: Media Matrix Worldwide Ltd - 512267 - Intimation Of Order Of The Regional Director For Shifting Of Registered Office Of The Company
announcements.detail: In furtherance to our intimations dated August 13, 2025 and January 23, 2026, w.r.t. the shifting of the Registered Office of the Company from the 'A/308, Dynasty Business Park CHS LTD, A K Road, Opp. Sangam Cinema, Nr. Kohinoor Hotel, Andheri (East), Mumbai - 400059, Maharashtra' in the State of Maharashtra to 'Plot No. 38, 4th Floor, Institutional Area, Sector 32, Gurugram-122001, Haryana' in the State of Haryana, we wish to inform you that Hon'ble ....
announcements.ai_summary: Media Matrix Worldwide Ltd has received an order from the Regional Director, Western Region, Mumbai, approving the shifting of its registered office. The company had previously informed the exchange on August 13, 2025, and January 23, 2026, about this proposed relocation. The registered office will be moved from 'A/308, Dynasty Business Park CHS LTD, A K Road, Opp. Sangam Cinema, Nr. Kohinoor Hotel, Andheri (East), Mumbai - 400059, Maharashtra' to 'Plot No. 38, 4th Floor, Institutional Area, Sector 32, Gurugram-122001, Haryana'. This order signifies a key step in the process of officially changing the company's registered jurisdiction from Maharashtra to Haryana.

announcements.subject: L&T Technology Services Ltd - 540115 - Entering Into Business Transfer Agreement To Sell And Transfer The Smart World And Communication Business Unit Of The Company On A Slump Sale Basis To AMI Paradigm Solutions Private Limited
announcements.detail: Intimation for entering into Business Transfer Agreement to sell and transfer the Smart World and Communication Business Unit of the Company comprising of the safe and smart segment and communication segment, on slump sale basis to AMI Paradigm Solutions Private Limited
announcements.ai_summary: L&T Technology Services Limited (LTTS) has entered into a Business Transfer Agreement (BTA) on March 25, 2026, to sell its Smart World and Communication Business Unit (SWC Unit) to AMI Paradigm Solutions Private Limited. This transaction is structured as a slump sale, meaning the entire business unit is being transferred as a going concern. The SWC Unit comprises the safe and smart segment and the communication segment of LTTS. This divestment is part of LTTS's strategic pivot towards focusing on engineering intelligence. Further details regarding the transaction are expected to be disclosed in accordance with SEBI Listing Regulations.

announcements.subject: Sancode Technologies Ltd - 543897 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Acquisition
announcements.detail: Disclosure for acquisition of additional shareholding by making wholly owned subsidiary Company.
announcements.ai_summary: Sancode Technologies Ltd's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on March 25, 2026, approved the acquisition of the remaining 1 Equity Share (0.01% stake) of Sancode Semi Private Limited. This acquisition makes Sancode Semi Private Limited a wholly-owned subsidiary of Sancode Technologies Limited, effective from March 25, 2026. The Board meeting commenced at 04:30 PM and concluded at 05:00 PM. Additional details as required by SEBI circular HO/49/14/14(7)2025-CFD-POD2/I/3762/2026 dated January 30, 2026, are enclosed as Annexure – I.

announcements.subject: Vikram Solar Ltd - 544488 - Corporate Announcement Filed Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed the corporate announcement filed under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Vikram Solar Ltd has filed a corporate announcement under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015, providing detailed reasons for the resignation of Mr. Anil Bhadauria, Executive Vice President & Head of Manufacturing Operations. This announcement is in continuation of their earlier intimation dated March 20, 2026, and in response to a query from BSE Ltd. dated March 21, 2026. Mr. Bhadauria's resignation is effective from May 31, 2026. The company has enclosed the letter from Mr. Anil Bhadauria specifying the reason for his resignation.

announcements.subject: Max Healthcare Institute Ltd - 543220 - Hon'Ble National Company Law Tribunal Order For Voluntary Liquidation Of ET Planners Private Limited
announcements.detail: Hon''ble National Company Law Tribunal order for voluntary liquidation of ET Planners Private Limited
announcements.ai_summary: Max Healthcare Institute Ltd has informed the exchange that ET Planners Private Limited, a step-down wholly-owned subsidiary, has been dissolved as per an order passed by the Hon'ble National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), New Delhi Bench, Court-VI. The NCLT order for the voluntary liquidation of ET Planners Private Limited was passed on March 25, 2026, and the company received the order on the same day at 6:00 pm (IST). This liquidation is not expected to have any material impact on the business, accounting policies, or financials of Max Healthcare Institute Ltd. The company had previously intimated about the ongoing voluntary liquidation on September 6, 2024, September 11, 2024, and October 18, 2024.

announcements.subject: NIS Management Ltd - 544495 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Award of Work Order to Subsidiary Company by Mumbai Police, Home Department, Government of Maharashtra.
announcements.ai_summary: NIS Management Ltd's subsidiary, NIS Facility Management Services Private Limited, has been awarded a work order by the Mumbai Police, Home Department, Government of Maharashtra. This order is for Project Planning and Management, Network Connectivity, Operation & Maintenance (O&M), and Warranty of CCTV Cameras. The total revenue expected from this work order is INR 2,18,00,000 (Rupees Two Crores Eighteen Lakhs Only), inclusive of all taxes. The company views this as a testament to its subsidiary's team's dedication and expertise and is excited about the collaboration with the Mumbai Police.

announcements.subject: LIC Housing Finance Ltd - 500253 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of LIC Housing Finance Ltd, in a meeting held on March 25, 2026, approved a borrowing budget of Rs. 127,000 Crore for the Financial Year 2026-2027. This borrowing will be undertaken through various instruments including loans, redeemable non-convertible debentures, zero-couponed bonds, subordinate debt, Upper Tier II bonds, commercial paper, external commercial borrowing, bonds, foreign currency bonds, securitization by private placement or public issue, refinance from NHB, deposits from public and corporates, direct assignment, and other borrowing methods. The approval also includes proposed fundraising through these avenues. The Audit Committee had recommended this borrowing budget in their meeting on March 24, 2026.

announcements.subject: National Highways Infra Trust - 543385 - Reg 23(5)(i): Disclosure of material issue
announcements.detail: National Highways Infra Trust has informed the Exchange regarding Disclosure of material issue
announcements.ai_summary: National Highways Infra Trust has submitted a disclosure regarding a material issue under Regulation 7(2)(b) of the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015. This disclosure was received from the National Highways Authority of India, pursuant to Regulation 7(2)(a) of the same regulations. The company is acting as the Investment Manager to the National Highways Infra Trust.

announcements.subject: Jio Financial Services Ltd - 543940 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Acquisition
announcements.detail: Investment in Reliance International Leasing IFSC Private Limited by Jio Leasing Services Limited
announcements.ai_summary: Jio Leasing Services Limited (JLSL), a wholly owned subsidiary of Jio Financial Services Ltd, has subscribed to and been allotted 6,39,40,000, 8.1% Cumulative Optionally Convertible Preference Shares of Rs.10 each in Reliance International Leasing IFSC Private Limited (RILIPL). The total subscription amount is Rs.63.94 crore, paid at par. RILIPL is a 50:50 joint venture between JLSL and Reliance Strategic Business Ventures Limited. This investment is intended to fund RILIPL's business operations. The aggregate investment by JLSL in RILIPL since the last disclosure is Rs.82.80 crore. This transaction is a related party transaction on an arm's length basis, with no interest from the Company's promoter or promoter group.

announcements.subject: Chatterbox Technologies Ltd - 544546 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of The Board Meeting Dated 25Th March, 2026
announcements.detail:
inter-alia, considered the following businesses:

2.Approved the change in the registered office of the Company within the local limits of the same city from 'Unit No. 101, VIP Plaza Co-operative Premises Society Ltd., Andheri New Link Road, Opp. Infinity ....
announcements.ai_summary: Chatterbox Technologies Ltd's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on March 25, 2026, approved the utilization of CSR funds amounting to ₹17,10,000 (Rupees Seventeen Lakh Ten Thousand only) for Corporate Social Responsibility activities. The board also approved a change in the company's registered office within the local limits of Mumbai. The meeting was conducted via video conferencing.

announcements.subject: G R Infraprojects Ltd - 543317 - Intimation Of Sale And Transfer Of Three Wholly Owned Subsidiaries.
announcements.detail: Intimation of Sale and Transfer of Three Wholly Owned Subsidiaries.
announcements.ai_summary: G R Infraprojects Ltd has informed the exchanges about the sale and transfer of its three wholly owned subsidiaries: GR Bilaspur Urga Highway Private Limited (GBUHPL), GR Ujjain Badnawar Highway Private Limited (GUBHPL), and GR Ena Kim Expressway Private Limited (GEKEPL). These subsidiaries have been transferred to Indus Infra Trust on March 25, 2026, after the receipt of consideration. Consequently, these entities will cease to be wholly owned subsidiaries of G R Infraprojects Ltd. GR Ena Kim Expressway Private Limited was a material subsidiary, and shareholder approval was sought via postal ballot.

announcements.subject: Popular Vehicles and Services Ltd - 544144 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 Regarding The Corporate Guarantee To Prabal Motors Private Limited And Popular Mega Motors (India) Private Limited, The Subsidiaries Of The Company.
announcements.detail: Announcement under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 regarding the Corporate Guarantee to Prabal Motors Private Limited and Popular Mega Motors (India) Private Limited, the subsidiaries of the Company.
announcements.ai_summary: Popular Vehicles and Services Ltd has renewed and extended corporate guarantees for its subsidiaries, Prabal Motors Private Limited and Popular Mega Motors (India) Private Limited. For Prabal Motors Private Limited, the company is extending a corporate guarantee in favour of IndusInd Bank Limited for credit facilities aggregating Rs.22,50,00,000 (Rupees Twenty-Two Crores Fifty Lakhs only), which includes Rs.15,00,00,000 for the Channel Financing Under CF Program with Daimler India Commercial Vehicle Private Limited and Rs.7,50,00,000 for ad-hoc facilities. Additionally, a corporate guarantee of up to Rs.2,00,00,000 (Rupees Two Crores only) is being extended in favour of Sundaram Finance Limited for a trade advance facility. For Popular Mega Motors (India) Private Limited, a corporate guarantee of up to Rs.5,00,00,000 (Rupees Five Crores only) is being extended in favour of Sundaram Finance Limited for a trade advance facility.

announcements.subject: IIRM Holdings India Ltd - 526530 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Acquisition
announcements.detail: Acquisition by India Insure Risk Management and Insurance Broking Services Private Limited
announcements.ai_summary: IIRM Holdings India Ltd, through its wholly owned subsidiary India Insure Risk Management and Insurance Broking Services Private Limited, has acquired equity shares in Saferisk Insurance Brokers Private Limited. The target entity, Saferisk, had a turnover of Rs.27.78 crore and a net worth of Rs.17.91 crore in FY 2024-25, with a Profit After Tax (PAT) of Rs.1 crore for the same period. This acquisition is a continuation of previous disclosures made on July 31, 2025, and October 30, 2025. The specific details of the acquisition are provided in Annexure I, as per SEBI circulars.

announcements.subject: Gail (India) Ltd - 532155 - REVISION IN COMPLETION SCHEDULE FOR DURGAPUR - HALDIA & DHAMRA - HALDIA PIPELINE SECTIONS OF INTEGRATED JAGDISHPUR - HALDIA - BOKARO - DHAMRA PIPELINE PROJECT
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed disclosure pertaining to event or information as stipulated in Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: GAIL (India) Ltd has revised the completion schedule for the Durgapur – Haldia and Dhamra – Haldia pipeline sections of the integrated Jagdishpur – Haldia – Bokaro – Dhamra Pipeline Project. The balance sections for the Dhamra – Haldia Pipeline are now expected to be completed between March 2026 and September 2026, a revision from the previous March 2026 target. Similarly, the Kolkata – Haldia Section and the Dhamra – Haldia (West Bengal) section also have their completion dates revised to September 2026. The rationale for this delay is attributed to issues with Right of Use (RoU) and fisheries front availability. The Board of Directors approved this revision in their meeting held on March 25, 2026.

announcements.subject: Indus Infra Trust - 544137 - Reg 23(5)(i): Disclosure of material issue
announcements.detail: Indus Infra Trust has informed the Exchange regarding Disclosure of material issue
announcements.ai_summary: Indus Infra Trust has completed the acquisition of one hundred percent equity shares of GR Ena Kim Expressway Private Limited, GR Ujjain Badnawar Highway Private Limited, and GR Bilaspur Urga Highway Private Limited on March 25, 2026. These three entities are collectively referred to as the "ROFO Assets" and were acquired from G R Infraprojects Limited. This completion follows an earlier intimation dated March 25, 2026. The Trust has also uploaded this information on its website.

announcements.subject: Welspun Living Ltd - 514162 -  Update On The  Acquisition Of Stake In Welspun Corporate Services Limited (Formerly Known As Welspun Home Textiles Limited)
announcements.detail: Please find attached herewith intimation on Acquisition of stake in Welspun Corporate Services Limited (Formerly known as Welspun Home Textiles Limited)
announcements.ai_summary: Welspun Living Ltd has completed the acquisition of 3,500 equity shares of Rs.10 each in Welspun Corporate Services Limited (formerly Welspun Home Textiles Limited) for a consideration of Rs.35,000. This acquisition represents 35% of the total paid-up equity share capital of Welspun Corporate Services Limited. Following this transaction, Welspun Corporate Services Limited has become an associate of Welspun Living Ltd. This update is in continuation of a previous disclosure made on March 19, 2026, regarding the initial agreement for this acquisition.

announcements.subject: RBL Bank Ltd - 540065 - RBL Bank Limited Informs The Exchange About Intimation Under SEBI Listing Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: RBL Bank Limited informs the exchange about update on disclosure made on October 18, 2025.
announcements.ai_summary: RBL Bank Limited has provided an update regarding its earlier disclosure dated October 18, 2025. On March 25, 2026, the bank was informed by Emirates NBD Bank (P.J.S.C) that it has received approval from the Central Bank of United Arab Emirates for its proposed acquisition of a majority stake in RBL Bank and the amalgamation of its existing Indian operations into the bank. This approval is contingent upon receiving all necessary regulatory approvals. The information is being hosted on the bank's website, www.rbl.bank.in, in compliance with SEBI Listing Regulations.

announcements.subject: JSW Steel Ltd - 500228 - Update On Acquisition Of Minas De Revuboe Limitada
announcements.detail: Update on Acquisition of 92.19% equity stake and shareholders loans of Minas de Revuboe Limitada
announcements.ai_summary: JSW Natural Resources Limited, a wholly-owned subsidiary of JSW Steel Ltd, has completed the acquisition of 92.19% of the equity stake and shareholders' loans of Minas de Revuboe Limitada (MdR). The transaction, which was finalized on March 25, 2026, involved the transfer of USD 74.24 million to designated escrow accounts, as per definitive agreements. This update follows previous intimations on May 17, 2024, January 28, 2025, and March 26, 2025. The disclosure will also be available on the company's website, www.jsw.in.

announcements.subject: Rajapalayam Mills Ltd-$ - 532503 - Announcement Under Reg 30 Of SEBI (LODR)
announcements.detail: The Company has submitted Corporate Guarantee to M/s. Kotak Mahindra Investments Limited pursuant to Board Approval dated 11-08-2025.
announcements.ai_summary: Rajapalayam Mills Ltd has submitted a Corporate Guarantee to M/s. Kotak Mahindra Investments Limited on behalf of M/s. Sandhya Spinning Mill Limited. This guarantee, valued at Rs. 40 Crores, was approved by the Board of Directors on August 11, 2025, and was submitted on March 25, 2026. The corporate guarantee is in connection with a loan facility sanctioned by M/s. Kotak Mahindra Investments Limited to M/s. Sandhya Spinning Mill Limited. The disclosure is made in accordance with SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Affle 3I Ltd - 542752 - Intimaton Regarding Grant Of Patent In India
announcements.detail: Please refer to the letter attached
announcements.ai_summary: Affle 3I Ltd (formerly Affle (India) Limited) announced on March 25, 2026, that it has been granted a new patent in India, which was previously granted in the US. This patent, titled "Method and system for establishing a decentralized repository of fraudulent IP addresses and publishers utilizing blockchain," strengthens the company's AI-powered consumer platform stack and its conversion-driven CPCU model. The patented technology establishes a blockchain-enabled, decentralized shared repository for fraud intelligence within the digital advertising ecosystem, allowing authorized participants to securely record, verify, and act on suspicious traffic signals.

announcements.subject: eMudhra Ltd - 543533 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: eMudhra Calls for Trust Infrastructure to Secure Digital Public Infrastructure at National Scale.
announcements.ai_summary: eMudhra Ltd has issued a press release on March 25, 2026, highlighting the critical need for robust trust infrastructure to secure national-scale digital public infrastructure. The company emphasizes that cryptographic trust infrastructure is essential for securing identity, transactions, and governance within digital ecosystems. This initiative aims to address the growing reliance on digital platforms for public services and transactions globally. The press release will be hosted on the company's website, www.emudhra.com, for public access and information.

announcements.subject: Welspun Corp Ltd - 532144 - Grant Of Stock Options-Welspun Corp Employee Benefit Scheme -2022
announcements.detail: Grant of Stock Options-Welspun Corp Employee Benefit Scheme-2022
announcements.ai_summary: The Nomination and Remuneration Committee of Welspun Corp Ltd, at its meeting on March 25, 2026, granted 86,717 stock options to eligible employees under the Welspun Corp Employee Benefit Scheme – 2022. These options are implemented through the Welspun Corp Employees Welfare Trust and are in compliance with SEBI (Share Based Employee Benefits and Sweat Equity) Regulations, 2021. The options will vest over three years, with 30% vesting in the first year, 35% in the second, and 35% in the third, with the first vesting occurring one year from the grant date. The vested options can be exercised within one year from their respective vesting dates at an exercise price of Rs. 300 per option.

announcements.subject: Nexome Capital Markets Ltd - 508905 - Intimation For Receipt Of Trading Approval
announcements.detail: Intimation for receipt of Trading Approval from BSE Limited for Rights Issue
announcements.ai_summary: Nexome Capital Markets Ltd has received Trading Approval from BSE Limited for its Rights Issue. The approval, dated March 25, 2026, pertains to the trading of 29,38,500 Equity Shares of Rs. 10.00 each, issued at a premium of Rs. 65/- on a rights basis. These shares bear distinctive numbers from 58,77,001 to 88,15,500. This intimation is made pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The trading approval letter from BSE Limited has been enclosed.

announcements.subject: Regency Fincorp Ltd - 540175 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Amendments to Memorandum & Articles of Association
announcements.detail: Alteration in Articles of Association subject to approval of Members
announcements.ai_summary: Regency Fincorp Ltd's Board of Directors met on March 25, 2026, concluding at 7:00 PM. During the meeting, the Board approved the appointment of Mr. Sanjay Mittal as an Additional Director in the capacity of Non-Executive Independent Director. The Board also took note of the resignation tendered by Ms. Saloni Shrivastav from the position of Non-Executive Independent Director. The company also considered and approved alterations to its Memorandum and Articles of Association, subject to member approval.

announcements.subject: Cupid Breweries And Distilleries Ltd - 512361 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015- Registration Of Land In The State Of Goa
announcements.detail: The Company has completed the execution and registration of a Sale Deed on March 24, 2026 for acquisition of land admeasuring 32,160 sq. meters in the state of Goa with the long term strategic objective of establishing substantial own production facilities and strengthening its position as a major player in the industry.
announcements.ai_summary: Cupid Breweries and Distilleries Ltd has completed the acquisition of land in the state of Goa. The company executed and registered a Sale Deed on March 24, 2026, for land measuring 32,160 sq. meters. This acquisition is intended for establishing substantial own production facilities, specifically an alcobev manufacturing unit, to strengthen its position in the industry. The announcement is made under Regulation 30 read with Schedule III of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: AK Capital Services Ltd - 530499 -  Intimation For Allotment Of Commercial Papers
announcements.detail: The Banking and Investment Committee of the Company, approved the allotment of 100 units of Commercial Papers of face value of INR 5,00,000/- each, aggregating to INR 5,00,00,000/- (Indian Rupees Five Crores only).
announcements.ai_summary: AK Capital Services Limited's Banking and Investment Committee, in a meeting held on March 25, 2026, approved the allotment of 100 units of Commercial Papers (CPs). Each CP has a face value of INR 5,00,000/-, aggregating to INR 5,00,00,000/- (Indian Rupees Five Crores only). The CPs were issued on March 24, 2026, and are set to mature on October 15, 2026. The discount rate is 9.00% per annum, and the issue price per CP is INR 4,76,054/-. The Commercial Papers are proposed to be listed on BSE Limited.

announcements.subject: Tata Steel Ltd - 500470 - Disclosure Under Regulations 30 And 51 Of Securities And Exchange Board Of India (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Disclosure under Regulations 30 and 51 of Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Tata Steel Limited has provided a disclosure under Regulations 30 and 51 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, referencing prior disclosures on June 29, 2025, December 19, 2025, and March 12, 2026. The company had previously received a show cause cum demand notice dated June 27, 2025, from the Office of the Commissioner (Audit), Central Tax, Ranchi. This notice proposed the disallowance of Input Tax Credit for the period FY2018-19 through FY2022-23, potentially leading to a Goods and Service Tax (GST) demand of ₹1007,54,83,342/- along with interest and penalty.

announcements.subject: NHPC Ltd - 533098 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting Held On 25.03.2026
announcements.detail: In compliance to Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015, outcome of Board meeting held on 25.03.2026 for approval of borrowing plan for FY 2026-27 is submitted. The details are given in attached letter.
announcements.ai_summary: NHPC Ltd's Board of Directors met on March 25, 2026, from 5:15 PM to 6:45 PM. The Board approved the borrowing plan for the financial year 2026-27. The company plans to raise debt up to Rs. 8,000 crore during FY 2026-27 through secured or unsecured means, which may be redeemable. This outcome is in compliance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, and follows an earlier intimation dated March 18, 2026.

announcements.subject: Max India Ltd - 543223 - Announcement Under Regulation 30
announcements.detail: Announcement under Regulation 30
announcements.ai_summary: Max India Ltd has announced that its step-down wholly-owned subsidiary, Antara Purukul Senior Living Limited, has received an assessment order under Section 143(3) of the Income Tax Act, 1961, for the assessment year 2024-25. This order raises a demand of Rs. 31.53 Crore. The company is providing this information as per Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. Details of the order received from the Income Tax department are enclosed in Annexure-A.

announcements.subject: B-Right Realestate Ltd - 543543 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Corporate Guarantee
announcements.detail: Issuance of Corporate Guarantee to Siddhivinayak Developers Kurar, Step-Down Subsidiary.
announcements.ai_summary: B-Right Realestate Limited is issuing a Corporate Guarantee for a Construction Finance Loan of Rs 45 Crore. This loan is being availed by Siddhivinayak Developers Kurar, which is a step-down subsidiary of B-Right Realestate Limited. The announcement is made in compliance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. Further details regarding the guarantee are provided in Annexure I, as per SEBI Circular No. HO/49/14/14(7)2025-CFD-POD2/I/3762/2026 dated January 30, 2026.

announcements.subject: 3i Infotech Ltd - 532628 - Update On Disclosure Made Dated July 3, 2025 And November 27, 2025 Under Regulation 30
announcements.detail: Update on Disclosure made dated July 3, 2025 and November 27, 2025 under regulation 30
announcements.ai_summary: 3i Infotech Ltd has provided an update on disclosures made on July 3, 2025, and November 27, 2025, concerning the "Direct Tax Vivad Se Vishwas Scheme, 2024." The material subsidiary, 3i Infotech Digital BPS Limited (formerly 3i Infotech BPO Limited), received a final order in Form 4 for the financial year 2013-14 from the CIT TDS 2, Delhi, dated March 23, 2026. This order confirms the status of the revised Form 2 issued on November 26, 2025. The event occurred on March 24, 2026, at 5:03 p.m. This intimation is also available on the company's website.

announcements.subject: IRB InvIT Fund - 540526 - Reg 23(5)(i): Disclosure of material issue
announcements.detail: IRB Invit Fund has informed the Exchange regarding Disclosure of material issue
announcements.ai_summary: IRB InvIT Fund has announced a disclosure under Regulation 7(2)(a) of the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015. Mr. Virendra D. Mhaiskar, Promoter, Chairman & Managing Director of the Sponsor of IRB InvIT Fund, has acquired Units of the Trust. The specific number of units acquired and the percentage of total voting capital before and after the transaction are not detailed in this announcement. This disclosure is made in relation to an acquisition of units. Investors should refer to the attached disclosure for further details on the transaction.

announcements.subject: RailTel Corporation of India Ltd - 543265 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: New order received
announcements.ai_summary: RailTel Corporation of India Ltd has received a Work Order from the State Crime Records Bureau, Bhopal. The order is for the SITC (Supply, Installation, Testing, and Commissioning) of Software Defined Wide Area Network 2025 (SD-WAN) and support for 3 years. The broad consideration for this order is Rs. 29,48,75,480/- (Including Tax). The order is to be executed by March 24, 2029. This is a domestic order, and neither the promoter nor any group companies have an interest in the entity awarding the order.

announcements.subject: Shriram Finance Ltd - 511218 - Approval Received By MUFG Bank Ltd From The Competition Commission Of India In Relation To Its Proposed Investment In Shriram Finance Limited
announcements.detail: Approval received by MUFG from CCI
announcements.ai_summary: Shriram Finance Limited has announced that MUFG Bank Ltd has received approval from the Competition Commission of India (CCI) in relation to its proposed investment in Shriram Finance Limited. This approval is a key step for the proposed issuance of 47,11,21,055 Equity Shares of Shriram Finance Limited to MUFG Bank Ltd via a preferential issue on a private placement basis, as per the Investment Agreement dated December 19, 2025. This disclosure is made pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI Listing Regulations.

announcements.company: Cholamandalam Investment and Finance Company Ltd
announcements.subject: Cholamandalam Investment and Finance Company Ltd - 511243 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Enclosed Reg.30 intimation.
announcements.ai_summary: Cholamandalam Investment and Finance Company Limited has been awarded a works contract for the construction of its Corporate Office building located at 18 & 18/1, Velachery Main Road, Guindy, Chennai – 600 032. The total consideration for this contract is Rs.540 crores. The contract has been awarded to M/s. Kalpataru Projects International Limited, a domestic entity. Further details as required under Regulation 30 of the SEBI Listing Regulations are provided in an annexure.

announcements.subject: Uravi Defence and Technology Ltd - 543930 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Updates on Acquisition
announcements.detail: Acquisition of Shares of Spafax International Holdings ('Spafax') Limited by Bharat Technology Limited ('Wholly Owned Subsidiary')
announcements.ai_summary: Bharat Technology Limited, a wholly-owned subsidiary of Uravi Defence and Technology Ltd, has acquired 10,100 Equity Shares of Spafax International Holdings Limited ("Spafax"). This acquisition represents 10% of the total share capital of Spafax. This announcement is made pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. This update follows a previous intimation dated February 20, 2026.

announcements.subject: Josts Engineering Company Ltd - 505750 - Update On Sale Of Undertaking
announcements.detail: Update on Sale of Undertaking
announcements.ai_summary: Josts Engineering Company Ltd has provided an update on the sale of its undertaking, specifically its 100% shareholding in its material subsidiary, JECL Engineering Limited (JECL). Following shareholder approval obtained through postal ballot on March 11, 2026, the company transferred its holding in JECL on March 24, 2026, upon receipt of the consideration, after necessary adjustments and deduction of a holdback amount. Definitive agreements were also entered into on March 24, 2026. Consequently, JECL has ceased to be a subsidiary of Josts Engineering Company Ltd effective from the end of the day on March 24, 2026. This follows prior intimations on February 5, 2026, and February 6, 2026, regarding the sale and the entry into a Share Purchase Agreement with Mr. Rahul Dhoot.

announcements.subject: Aion-Tech Solutions Ltd - 531439 - Announcement Under Reg 30 (LODR) For Change In Designation Of Mr. Chanakya Bellam Radha Krishna As Whole-Time Director, With Effect From May 01, 2026.
announcements.detail: Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR) for Change in Designation of Mr. Chanakya Bellam Radha Krishna as Whole-time Director, subject to the approval of members, with effect from May 01, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Aion-Tech Solutions Ltd, at their meeting held on March 25, 2026, approved the change in designation of Mr. Chanakya Bellam Radha Krishna to Whole-time Director. This change is subject to the approval of the company's members and will be effective from May 01, 2026. The recommendation for this change was made by the Nomination and Remuneration Committee. Further details as required by SEBI regulations are provided in Annexure-A.

announcements.subject: BCPL Railway Infrastructure Ltd - 542057 - Postal Ballot Notice - Start Date 27-03-2026 To End Date 25-04-2026
announcements.detail: Please find attached the postal ballot notice with the e-voting intimation to the members
announcements.ai_summary: BCPL Railway Infrastructure Ltd has issued a Postal Ballot Notice to its members, which includes an e-voting intimation. The notice seeks approval for the re-appointment of Mr. Sudipta Kumar Mukherjee as the Non-Executive Independent Director for a period of five consecutive years, from January 30, 2026, up to January 29, 2031. The e-voting period will commence on Friday, March 27, 2026, at 09:00 A.M. (IST) and will conclude on Saturday, April 25, 2026, at 05:00 P.M. (IST). The cut-off date for determining eligibility for e-voting was Friday, March 20, 2026. This information is also available on the company's website, www.bcril.com.

announcements.subject: ASI Industries Ltd - 502015 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Updates on Acquisition
announcements.detail: Update on acqusition of unlisted shares.
announcements.ai_summary: ASI Industries Ltd has provided an update on its investment in M/s. Sunsure Solarpark Fifty Two Private Limited (“SSFTPL”) for the procurement of Solar Power. As part of the first tranche of the transaction, the company has subscribed to and been allotted 1308 fully paid equity shares of Rs 10/- each. These shares were allotted at a premium of Rs.1384/-, aggregating to Rs.18.23 lakhs. This update is a continuation of the company's previous letter dated February 10, 2026, regarding this investment.

announcements.subject: Bizotic Commercial Ltd - 543926 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting Held Today I.E., Wednesday, 25Th March, 2026
announcements.detail: We hereby inform you that the Board of Directors, at its meeting held today, i.e., Wednesday, 25th March, 2026, at the Registered Office of the Company situated at 15, Ashwamegh Warehouses, Ujala Circle, Sarkhej, Ahmedabad, Dascroi, Gujarat, India - 382210, which commenced at 05:45 P.M. and concluded at 06:20 P.M., has considered and approved the receipt of the 5th tranche of consideration for the allotment of Convertible Warrants ('Warrants').
announcements.ai_summary: At a Board Meeting held on March 25, 2026, Bizotic Commercial Ltd approved the receipt of the 5th tranche of consideration for the allotment of Convertible Warrants. These warrants were issued at a price of Rs. 290.00/- each, which includes a premium of Rs. 280.00/- per warrant and a face value of Rs. 10.00/- per warrant. The warrants were issued on a preferential basis to persons/entities belonging to the “Promoter and Promoter Group Category” in accordance with SEBI (ICDR) Regulations, 2018. The company has received Rs. 6,71,56,000/- (Rupees Six Crores Seventy-One Lakhs Fifty-Six Thousand Only) as the 5th tranche of consideration from the allottees, including Ms. Sangita Annmo.

announcements.subject: Concord Control Systems Ltd - 543619 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Disclosure of Order
announcements.ai_summary: Concord Control Systems Ltd, through its wholly owned subsidiary Advanced Rail Controls Private Limited, has been awarded an order by Indian Railways. The order is for the supply, installation, and commissioning of a Loco wireless control system. The broad consideration for this order is Rs. 84.68 Crores. This disclosure is made pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The information is also available on the company's website.

announcements.subject: JSW Cement Ltd - 544480 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Acquisition
announcements.detail: Incorporation of Wholly Owned Subsidiary- JSW Cement Middleeast LLC-SPC
announcements.ai_summary: JSW Cement Limited has incorporated an overseas Wholly Owned Subsidiary named JSW CEMENT MIDDLEEAST L.L.C – SPC. This incorporation was done under the law of Fujairah, UAE, and falls under the jurisdiction of Fujairah Municipality. This announcement is a follow-up to the company's intimation dated February 4, 2026, regarding the planned incorporation of this subsidiary. The details of this incorporation are being provided in accordance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Vardhman Polytex Ltd - 514175 - Board Meeting Outcome for Allotment Of 75,00,000 Shares Upon Conversion Of Warrants Issued On Preferential Basis.
announcements.detail: Outcome of Board Meeting held on 25.03.2026 for allotment of 75 lakh shares upon conversion of warrants issued on preferential basis is attached.
announcements.ai_summary: At a Board Meeting held on March 25, 2026, Vardhman Polytex Ltd approved the allotment of 75,00,000 equity shares. These shares are fully paid-up, with a face value of Re.1/- each, and are allotted at a price of Rs.12.55 per share, which includes a premium of Rs. 11.55 per share. This allotment is a consequence of the conversion of 75,00,000 warrants that were previously issued on a preferential basis. The company had previously informed about the allotment of 7,24,50,000 convertible warrants on preferential basis at a price of Rs. 12.55 per warrant to an entity falling under the “Promoter Group”.

announcements.subject: Aster DM Healthcare Ltd - 540975 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR) Regulations
announcements.detail: Announcement under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations
announcements.ai_summary: Aster DM Healthcare Ltd has submitted details of an order received under the Central Goods and Services Tax Act, 2017, as per Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations. The order was received on March 25, 2025, from the Assistant Commissioner, Kochi Commissionerate (Ernakulam Division). The nature of the action taken is an intimation of an amount ascertained as payable under Section 74 of the Central Goods and Services Tax Act, 2017. Further details regarding this order are provided in Annexure-A.

announcements.subject: City Union Bank Ltd - 532210 - Opening Of New Branches
announcements.detail: Our Bank has opened 3 New Branches on March 25, 2026 and as on date the Bank has 935 Branches in total
announcements.ai_summary: City Union Bank Ltd announced the opening of three new branches on March 25, 2026. These new branches are located in Bharatpur, Rajasthan; Kondanagaram, Tamil Nadu; and Maravanmadam, Tamil Nadu. Following the opening of these branches, the total number of branches for City Union Bank Ltd now stands at 935. This expansion is in line with the bank's strategy to increase its reach and customer service points.

announcements.subject: Nucleus Software Exports Ltd - 531209 - Board Meeting Outcome for OUTCOME OF BOARD MEETING
announcements.detail: OUTCOME OF BOARD MEETING HELD ON MARCH 25, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Nucleus Software Exports Ltd held a meeting on March 25, 2026, from 09:30 am to 05:55 pm. During this meeting, the Board considered and approved the termination of the ESOP Scheme – 2015 and the dissolution of the Nucleus Software Employee Welfare Trust. Additionally, the Board considered and approved the Nucleus Software RSU Scheme – 2026, which will have an initial Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) Pool of 10,00,000 RSUs. This pool may be adjusted for future corporate actions such as bonus issues, right issues, stock splits, consolidations, mergers, demergers, or other reorganizations of the company's capital structure.

announcements.subject: Artson Ltd - 522134 -  Board Comments On Fine Levied By BSE
announcements.detail: Board comments on fine lavied by BSE - details enclosed.
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Artson Ltd, at their meeting on March 25, 2026, reviewed a communication from BSE Limited dated February 13, 2026, regarding a fine levied for non-compliance with Regulation 29(2)/29(3) of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015. This non-compliance was due to a delay in prior intimation about a Board Meeting for the quarter ended December 31, 2025. The Board noted that the oversight was inadvertent and unintentional, with no mala fide intention. They emphasized the company's commitment to regulatory compliance and instructed that strict adherence to regulations be ensured going forward.

announcements.subject: Embassy Developments Ltd - 532832 - Disclosures of reasons for encumbrance by promoter of listed companies under Reg. 31(1) read with Regulation 28(3) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011.
announcements.detail: The Exchange has received the Disclosures of reasons for encumbrance by promoter of listed companies under Reg. 31(1) read with Regulation 28(3) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011 on March 24, 2026 for Embassy Property Developments Pvt Ltd & JV Holdings Pvt Ltd
announcements.ai_summary: Embassy Property Developments Private Limited and JV Holding Private Limited, as promoters of Embassy Developments Limited, have submitted disclosures regarding the reasons for encumbrance (pledge) of shares. These encumbrances occurred between March 20, 2026, and March 23, 2026. The disclosures were made pursuant to Regulation 31(1) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, and were received by the stock exchanges on March 24, 2026. The filing also mentions details of secured, redeemable, unrated, unlisted non-convertible debentures.

announcements.subject: ABB India Ltd - 500002 - Disclosure Of Information As Per Regulation 30 Of The Securities And Exchange Board Of India (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Please refer enclosed file
announcements.ai_summary: ABB India Ltd has received an order from the Office of the Principal Commissioner of Customs, Bangalore, imposing a penalty of Rs. 17,68,303/- (Rupees Seventeen lakh sixty-eight thousand three hundred three) and a Redemption fine of Rs. 1,77,000/- (Rupees One lakh seventy-seven thousand only) under Section 114A of the Customs Act, 1962. The company plans to file an appeal against this order and is hopeful of a favorable outcome, not expecting any material impact on its operations. The disclosure was made on March 25, 2026.

announcements.subject: Fredun Pharmaceuticals Ltd - 539730 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting Dated 25Th March, 2026
announcements.detail: Allotment of 1,06,668 Equity Shares to Promoter upon conversion of Warrants into Equity Shares
announcements.ai_summary: Fredun Pharmaceuticals Ltd's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on March 25, 2026, approved the allotment of 1,06,668 Equity Shares to a Promoter upon the conversion of warrants. These warrants were initially allotted on a preferential basis to Promoters on December 29, 2025, following shareholder approval on October 22, 2025. The warrant holders have paid the balance consideration aggregating to Rs. 10,00,01,250/- and exercised their right to convert 1,06,668 warrants into equity shares. The allotted equity shares have a face value of Rs. 10/- each.

announcements.subject: Avenue Supermarts Ltd - 540376 - Store Opening Intimation
announcements.detail: Store Opening Intimation
announcements.ai_summary: Avenue Supermarts Ltd has opened a new store located at Sriperumbudur, Kancheepuram, Tamil Nadu, effective March 25, 2026. This opening brings the total number of stores operated by the company to 470 as of the current date. The company has informed the stock exchanges about this store opening.

announcements.subject: HFCL Ltd - 500183 - Outcome Of The Meeting Of The Board Of Directors Of The Company - Strategic Expansion And Consolidation Of Defence, Aeronautics And Aerostructure Business
announcements.detail: HFCL Limited ('HFCL'), pursuant to the approval of its Board of Directors at its meeting held today, has undertaken a major strategic initiative to expand and strengthen its Defence business, in line with its long-term growth strategy and evolving opportunities in the Defence sector including in Aeronautics and Aerostructure segments. The Board has also approved the delivery and performance of a memorandum of understanding ('MOU') signed by and amongst ....
announcements.ai_summary: HFCL Limited's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on March 25, 2026, approved a significant strategic initiative to expand and strengthen its Defence business. This expansion will also encompass the Aeronautics and Aerostructure segments, aligning with the company's long-term growth strategy and the evolving opportunities in the Defence sector. The Board also approved the delivery and performance of a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) signed amongst HFCL, HFCL Advance Systems Private Limited (HASPL), and another party. The board meeting commenced at 3:00 p.m. and concluded at 4:45 p.m.

announcements.subject: M P K Steels (I) Ltd - 544553 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of The Board Meeting Held Today I.E. March 25, 2026
announcements.detail: Outcome of the Board Meeting held today i.e. March 25, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of M P K Steels (I) Ltd, in their meeting held on March 25, 2026, approved several key agenda items. These include the shifting of the Company's Registered Office from the State of Assam to the State of Rajasthan, subject to member and regulatory approvals. Additionally, M/s. Jyoti Soni & Associates have been appointed as the Secretarial Auditor for the Financial Year 2025-26. The Board also resolved to convene an Extra Ordinary General Meeting (EGM) on Tuesday, April 28, 2026, at 10:30 a.m. The meeting commenced at an unspecified time and concluded on March 25, 2026.

announcements.subject: Polyplex Corporation Ltd - 524051 - Board Meeting Outcome for Board Approval For Acquisition Of 51% Of The Share Capital Of Technova Printrite Products Private Limited By Polyplex Corporation Limited
announcements.detail: Board has accorded its approval for acquisition of 51% of the share capital of TechNova Printrite Products Private Limited by Polyplex Corporation Limited
announcements.ai_summary: Polyplex Corporation Limited has executed a Share Purchase Agreement (SPA) dated March 25, 2026, for the acquisition of 51% of the equity share capital of TechNova Printrite Products Private Limited. The SPA was entered into with the Sellers, whose details are provided in Annexure 1. Concurrently, the company also executed a Shareholder’s and Rights Agreement. This acquisition marks a significant development for Polyplex Corporation Limited, as approved by its Board of Directors. The company will also be filing necessary disclosures under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirement) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Hazoor Multi Projects Ltd-$ - 532467 - Providing Corporate Guarantee
announcements.detail: We wish to inform you that the Company has provided Corporate Guarantee in  favour of Square Port Shipyard Private Limited (Wholly Owned Subsidiary Company)
announcements.ai_summary: Hazoor Multi Projects Limited's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on March 25, 2026, approved the provision of a Corporate Guarantee in favor of its wholly-owned subsidiary, Square Port Shipyard Private Limited. This guarantee is intended to secure credit facilities from Bank of Baroda. The facilities include a term loan of Rs. 45,00,00,000 (Rupees Forty-Five Crores) and a cash credit facility of Rs. 5,00,00,000 (Indian Rupees Five Crores). The Board meeting commenced at 4:00 pm and concluded at 5:30 pm on March 25, 2026.

announcements.subject: Welspun Enterprises Ltd - 532553 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Updates on Acquisition
announcements.detail: Update:- Completion of acquisition of Welspun Corporate Services Limited
announcements.ai_summary: Welspun Enterprises Ltd has successfully completed the acquisition of 2,000 equity shares of Rs. 10 each in Welspun Corporate Services Limited (WCSL), formerly known as Welspun Home Textiles Limited.
