The disclosure was made on March 25, 2026, in accordance with Regulation 23 of the SEBI (Infrastructure Investment Trusts) Regulations, 2014. The next steps involve finalizing closing adjustments as per the definitive agreements.

announcements.subject: MAS Financial Services Ltd - 540749 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Allotment
announcements.detail: Allotment of non-convertible debentures
announcements.ai_summary: MAS Financial Services Ltd has completed the allotment of 10,000 Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) with a face value of INR 1,00,000 each, aggregating to INR 100,00,00,000 (INR 100 Crore). These are rated, listed, senior, secured, redeemable, transferable, and taxable NCDs issued on a private placement basis. This decision was made by the Finance Committee of the Board of Directors on March 25, 2026, following a Board meeting on April 30, 2025. The company has complied with SEBI LODR Regulations and a master circular dated January 30, 2026. This issuance is a private placement, and no further approvals are immediately indicated as pending.

announcements.subject: Take Solutions Ltd - 532890 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release - TAKE Solutions Launches Take.Health - An Intelligent Health Companion Targeting India''s $197 Billion Healthcare Opportunity.
announcements.ai_summary: Take Solutions Ltd has launched "Take.Health," an AI-driven digital health platform focused on preventive healthcare and personalized insights. This initiative targets India's substantial $197 billion healthcare market, aligning with the company's strategy to develop scalable capabilities in digital health and AI solutions. The launch, announced on March 25, 2026, aims to provide continuous health monitoring for users. The company has submitted this information to the BSE and NSE as per Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The next steps involve the market adoption and growth of the Take.Health platform.

announcements.subject: SGL Resources Ltd - 526544 - Intimation Of Payment Of Fine As Levied Under Regulation 33 For The Period Ended December 31, 2025
announcements.detail: Intimation of payment of fine as lecied under Regulation 33 for non compliance with filling unaudited financial statements for the quarter ended December 31, 2025 within presecribed period under said regulation
announcements.ai_summary: SGL Resources Ltd has paid a fine of Rs. 88,500/- to BSE Limited on March 24, 2026. This fine was levied under Regulation 33 for non-compliance with filing unaudited financial statements for the quarter ended December 31, 2025, within the prescribed period. The company received an email on March 17, 2026, detailing the penalty. The fine includes GST. This action is in response to a SEBI SOP Circular no. SEBI/HO/49/14/14(7)2025-CFD-POD2/I/3762/2026 dated January 30, 2026.

announcements.subject: Fino Payments Bank Ltd - 543386 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 SEBI LODR
announcements.detail: Receipt of Order from Hon''ble High Court of Telangana
announcements.ai_summary: Fino Payments Bank Ltd has received an order from the Hon'ble High Court of Telangana on March 24, 2026, dismissing a Writ Petition filed by Mr. Rishi Gupta, MD & CEO, challenging his arrest. This order follows earlier disclosures made by the bank on February 27, 2026. The bank acknowledges the court's decision and is considering appropriate legal recourse. The ongoing investigation pertains to program managers associated with multiple banks, including Fino Payments Bank. The bank will provide further updates as legal proceedings progress.

announcements.subject: Sammaan Capital Ltd - 535789 - Intimation Under Regulations 30 And 51 Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, As Amended
announcements.detail:
This is further to our earlier intimations, with respect to the proposed acquisition of controlling stake in Sammaan Capital Limited by Avenir Investment RSC Ltd (Investor), which us owned and controlled by International Holding Company PJSC (Proposed Transaction).
We wish to inform that the Reserve Bank of India has vide its letter dated March 24, 2026, approved the applications made by the Company and Sammaan Finserve Limited (SFL)respectively, ....
announcements.ai_summary: Sammaan Capital Ltd has received approval from the Reserve Bank of India (RBI) on March 24, 2026, for the proposed acquisition of a controlling stake by Avenir Investment RSC Ltd. Avenir Investment RSC Ltd is owned and controlled by International Holding Company PJSC. This approval follows previous intimations made by the company on October 2, 2025, October 29, 2025, November 7, 2025, and December 10, 2025. The RBI's clearance is a significant step towards the completion of this proposed transaction.

announcements.subject: Nexome Capital Markets Ltd - 508905 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Issue of Securities
announcements.detail: Issue of Securities pursuant to Rights Issue.
announcements.ai_summary: Nexome Capital Markets Ltd has approved the allotment of 29,38,500 fully paid-up equity shares at an issue price of Rs. 75 per share, including a share premium of Rs. 65 per share. This allotment is a result of their Rights Issue, which opened on March 13, 2026, and closed on March 23, 2026, achieving an oversubscription of 100.79% against a total Rights Issue Size of Rs. 22,03,87,500. The Rights Issue Committee met on March 24, 2026, to finalize the Basis of Allotment in consultation with the Registrar to the Issue and BSE Limited. This action will modify the company's paid-up equity share capital.

announcements.subject: Josts Engineering Company Ltd - 505750 - Intimation Regarding Authorisation Given Under Reg 30(5) Of SEBI (LODR)
announcements.detail: Intimation regarding authorisation fiven under Reg 30(5) of SEBI (LODR)Regulations 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Josts Engineering Company Ltd's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on March 24, 2026, approved the divestment of a 50% equity stake in its joint venture, Suryavayu Renewable and Energy Solutions Private Limited (SRESPL), to Kay Cee Energy & Infra Limited (Kay Cee). The sale will be conducted at a fair market value of INR 4.124 per share, as determined by a Valuation Report. Post-transaction, SRESPL will cease to be a joint venture of Josts Engineering Company Ltd. The company also approved the incorporation of a new wholly-owned subsidiary in India to leverage future growth opportunities. These decisions are in compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: INTERISE TRUST - 541300 - Reg 23(5)(i): Disclosure of material issue
announcements.detail: INTERISE TRUST has informed the Exchange regarding Disclosure of material issue
announcements.ai_summary: Interise Trust has announced the reappointment of Ms. Neera Saggi as an Independent Director for a second term of 5 years, commencing March 24, 2026, and concluding on March 23, 2031. This decision was approved by the Board of Directors of Interise Investment Managers Private Limited, the Investment Manager to Interise Trust, following the conclusion of her first 5-year term on March 23, 2026. The reappointment is subject to shareholder approval.

announcements.subject: Sanathan Textiles Ltd - 544314 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Acquisition
announcements.detail: Sanathan Polycot Private Limited is a Wholly Owned Subsidiary of the Company who has entered into a Share Subscription and Shareholders Agreement and a Power Supply and Consumption Agreement to acquire 26% stake in Serentica Renewables India 33 Private Limited, for sourcing renewable power for a contracted capacity of 32 MW.
announcements.ai_summary: Sanathan Textiles Ltd.'s wholly-owned subsidiary, Sanathan Polycot Private Limited (SPPL), has entered into agreements to acquire a 26% stake in Serentica Renewables India 33 Private Limited. This acquisition, for sourcing renewable power with a contracted capacity of 32 MW, is structured through a Share Subscription and Shareholders’ Agreement and a Power Supply and Consumption Agreement. The deal is subject to conditions precedent and regulatory approvals, with completion expected in line with agreed tranche timelines.

announcements.subject: Kotak Mahindra Bank Ltd - 500247 - Update On Kotak Mahindra Investments Limited
announcements.detail: Intimation attached
announcements.ai_summary: Kotak Mahindra Bank Ltd. has announced that its wholly-owned subsidiary, Kotak Mahindra Investments Limited (KMIL), will cease to sanction new loans from April 1, 2026. This decision, approved by KMIL's Board of Directors on March 24, 2026, aims to simplify the group structure and enhance operational synergies, in compliance with RBI Directions. KMIL will continue to service its existing facilities. The business activities of KMIL will be conducted departmentally within Kotak Mahindra Bank Ltd. going forward.

announcements.subject: Welspun Corp Ltd - 532144 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Acquisition
announcements.detail: Intragroup Transaction: Transfer of 69,30,000 (22.0%) equity shares of East Pipes Integrated Company for Industry ("EPIC") from Welspun Mauritius Holdings Limited ("WMHL") to Welspun Pipes Inc ("WPI") both wholly owned subsidiaries of the Company.
announcements.ai_summary: Welspun Corp Ltd has completed an intragroup transaction where its wholly-owned subsidiary, Welspun Pipes Inc. (WPI), acquired 69,30,000 equity shares, representing a 22.0% stake, in East Pipes Integrated Company for Industry ("EPIC") from another wholly-owned subsidiary, Welspun Mauritius Holdings Limited (WMHL). The aggregate consideration for this transaction was SAR ~979.90 million. This acquisition was approved by the respective boards of WPI and WMHL and executed on the Tadawul Stock Exchange. Following this, EPIC will become an associate company of WPI, whereas it was previously an associate of WMHL. This transaction is reported under Regulation 30 of SEBI Listing Regulations and was announced on March 24, 2026.

announcements.subject: CESC Ltd - 500084 - Incorporation Of Two Subsidiary Companies
announcements.detail: Incorporation of two subsidiary companies
announcements.ai_summary: CESC Ltd has announced the incorporation of two new wholly-owned subsidiary companies, PURVAH ECOENERGY SOLUTIONS PRIVATE LIMITED and PURVAH POWER VENTURES PRIVATE LIMITED, both incorporated on March 24, 2026. These subsidiaries were established by Purvah Green Power Private Limited, which is itself a subsidiary of CESC Ltd. This move is in line with CESC Ltd's strategy to expand its business operations. The incorporation details are in compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. Investors should watch for future announcements regarding the specific business activities and financial contributions of these new entities.

announcements.subject: WeWork India Management Ltd - 544570 - Disclosures of reasons for encumbrance by promoter of listed companies under Reg. 31(1) read with Regulation 28(3) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011.
announcements.detail: The Exchange has received the Disclosures of reasons for encumbrance by promoter of listed companies under Reg. 31(1) read with Regulation 28(3) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011 on March 24, 2026 for Embassy Buildcon LLP
announcements.ai_summary: Embassy Buildcon LLP, as a promoter of WeWork India Management Limited, has disclosed the reasons for encumbering its shares on March 12, 2026, in compliance with SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011. This disclosure is made under Regulation 31(1) read with Regulation 28(3). The encumbrance affects more than 20% of the total share capital of WeWork India Management Limited, although it is less than 50% of the promoter's shareholding. The specific reasons for this encumbrance have been submitted to the stock exchanges. Investors should review the disclosed reasons to understand the implications for the promoter's stake and potential future actions. The filing was received by the exchange on March 24, 2026.

announcements.subject: NINtec Systems Ltd - 539843 - General Update
announcements.detail: Disclosure under Regulation 7(2) of SEBI (PIT) Regulations
announcements.ai_summary: NINtec Systems Ltd has filed disclosures under Regulation 7(2) of the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015. These disclosures, received from a Promoter & Director of the company in Form C, detail the purchase of equity shares. This filing is a routine compliance update regarding changes in the holdings of insiders.

announcements.subject: Aptus Pharma Ltd - 544529 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting Held On March 24, 2026
announcements.detail: Outcome of Board Meeting held on March 24, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Aptus Pharma Ltd, in their meeting held on March 24, 2026, approved a proposal to increase the company's authorized share capital from INR 7,15,00,000 to INR 25,00,00,000. This increase will be divided into 2,50,00,000 equity shares of Rs. 10 each. The board also recommended the issue of bonus equity shares, subject to member approval.

announcements.subject: Omega Interactive Technologies Ltd - 511644 - Clarification On Information Circulating On Social Media
announcements.detail: Clarification on false and misleading information circulating on social media platform such as telegram
announcements.ai_summary: Omega Interactive Technologies Ltd has issued a clarification to address false and misleading information circulating on social media platforms, specifically Telegram. The company denies involvement in or association with claims such as launching "project OMEORA," opening 500 AI centers in Gujarat, Oracle holding a 75% stake, or a 5000% profit rise. Omega Interactive Technologies Ltd is filing a formal complaint against these claims and remains committed to accurate disclosures via the BSE portal.

announcements.subject: Timex Group India Ltd-$ - 500414 - Report On Re-Lodgment Of Transfer Request Of Physical Shares
announcements.detail: Please find attached the report on re-lodgment of transfer request of physical shares in the format prescribed vide SEBI Circular No..SEBI/HO/MIRSD/MIRSD-PoD/P/CIR/2025/97 dated July 2,,2025.
announcements.ai_summary: Timex Group India Ltd has submitted a report on the re-lodgement of transfer requests for physical shares, as per SEBI Circular No. SEBI/HO/MIRSD/MIRSD-PoD/P/CIR/2025/97 dated July 2, 2025. In February 2026, one transfer request was processed and approved, with an average processing time of 41 days. This disclosure pertains to the company's compliance with SEBI regulations regarding the handling of physical share transfers.

announcements.subject: BCPL Railway Infrastructure Ltd - 542057 - Listing Of Its Shares With The National Stock Exchange Of India (NSE)
announcements.detail: We would like to inform you that the Company is permitted to list its securities for trading on the NSE Platform with effect from 27th March 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: BCPL Railway Infrastructure Ltd has received permission to list its equity shares on the National Stock Exchange of India (NSE) with effect from March 27, 2026. The company's shares will trade under the symbol "BCPL" in the "EQ" series. A total of 16,723,638 equity shares of face value Rs. 10 each are permitted for trading. This listing on the NSE will enhance the liquidity and accessibility of BCPL Railway Infrastructure Ltd's shares for investors.

announcements.subject: Airfloa Rail Technology Ltd - 544516 - Media Interaction With NDTV Profit On 24.03.2026
announcements.detail: Media Interaction with NDTV Profit on 24.03.2026
announcements.ai_summary: Airfloa Rail Technology Ltd announced that its Joint Managing Director, Mr. Dakshna Moorthy Manikandan, participated in a media interaction with NDTV Profit on March 24, 2026. During the interaction, recent developments and the current status of the company were discussed, based solely on publicly available information. No unpublished price-sensitive information (UPSI) was disclosed. A recording of the interaction is available online.

announcements.subject: Torrent Pharmaceuticals Ltd - 500420 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI LODR - NCLT Order
announcements.detail: Announcement under Regulation 30 of SEBI LODR - NCLT Order
announcements.ai_summary: Torrent Pharmaceuticals Limited announced on March 24, 2026, that the Hon’ble National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Ahmedabad Bench, has uploaded an order regarding the first motion application for the proposed amalgamation of J.B. Chemicals & Pharmaceuticals Limited with Torrent Pharmaceuticals Limited. This order was uploaded on the NCLT website on March 23, 2026. This announcement is a continuation of the company's earlier intimation dated June 29, 2025, regarding the amalgamation scheme. The NCLT order is a significant regulatory step in the amalgamation process.

announcements.subject: Suditi Industries Ltd - 521113 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Allotment
announcements.detail: Revised outcome filed for allotment of 6,95,100 Equity shares and 15,55,600 Warrants convertible into Equity shares on a preferential basis
announcements.ai_summary: Suditi Industries Ltd announced on March 24, 2026, the revised outcome of a circular resolution passed by its Board of Directors. The board approved the allotment of 6,95,100 Equity Shares at Rs. 59.12 per share, aggregating to Rs. 4,10,94,312. Additionally, 15,55,600 Warrants convertible into Equity Shares were also approved for allotment on a preferential basis. This allotment follows member approval obtained at an Extra-Ordinary General Meeting on January 16, 2026, and in-principal approval from BSE Limited on March 16, 2026. The company is proceeding with these allotments as per SEBI Listing Regulations.

announcements.subject: Ugro Capital Ltd - 511742 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Allotment
announcements.detail: Intimation of allotment of unlisted Commercial Papers
announcements.ai_summary: Ugro Capital Limited's Investment and Borrowing Committee approved the allotment of unlisted Commercial Papers (CPs) worth Rs. 25 Crores on March 24, 2026. This allotment was made as per the particulars provided in the annexure to the announcement. The company has made this information available on its website, www.ugrocapital.com, for public access. This action is in compliance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The Commercial Papers are unlisted securities.

announcements.subject: Ashapura Minechem Ltd - 527001 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Acquisition
announcements.detail: Incorporation of Wholly owned subsidiary in UAE
announcements.ai_summary: Ashapura Minechem Ltd announced on March 24, 2026, that its Board of Directors approved the introduction of the "ASHAPURA MINECHEM LIMITED - EMPLOYEE STOCK OPTION PLAN 2026" (ESOP 2026). This plan will be extended to employees of its holding company, subsidiaries, associate companies, and group companies, both present and future. The implementation of ESOP 2026 is subject to the approval of the company's shareholders through a postal ballot. The Nomination and Remuneration Committee recommended this plan. Shareholders will be asked to vote on this proposal.

announcements.subject: Kamdhenu Ltd - 532741 - Update On Acquisition
announcements.detail: Update on Acquisition
announcements.ai_summary: Kamdhenu Ltd has announced that Maa Kudargarhi Steels Private Limited (“MKSPL”), a franchisee unit, has allotted 20,000 equity shares to Kamdhenu Ltd on March 24, 2026. These shares were issued at a price of Rs. 5,000 per equity share, with a face value of Rs. 10, for a total consideration of Rs. 10,00,00,000. This allotment represents the conversion of an existing unsecured loan of Rs. 10 crore provided by Kamdhenu Ltd to MKSPL into equity.

announcements.subject: Responsive Industries Ltd - 505509 - Disclosure Under Regulation 31(1) Of SEBI SAST Regulations, 2011
announcements.detail: Disclosure for creation of pledge by the promoter group of the company
announcements.ai_summary: Responsive Industries Ltd has disclosed the creation of a pledge on shares by Fairpoint Tradecom LLP, a promoter group entity. This disclosure is made in accordance with Regulation 31(1) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, and the master circular dated February 16, 2023. Investors should note this development as it pertains to the pledging of promoter shares.

announcements.subject: Shalibhadra Finance Ltd - 511754 -  Disclosure In Terms Of Regulation 29(2) Of Securities And Exchange Board Of India (Substantial Acquisition Of Shares And Takeovers) Regulations, 2011
announcements.detail: Disclosure in terms of Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (SAST) Regulation 2011.
announcements.ai_summary: Ayushi Doshi, identified as part of the promoter group of Shalibhadra Finance Ltd, has made a disclosure under Regulation 29(2) of the SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011. This filing pertains to changes in her shareholding in Shalibhadra Finance Ltd, which is listed on the Bombay Stock Exchange. The specific details of the acquisition or disposal, including the number of shares and percentage of total voting capital, are provided in the annexure to this disclosure.

announcements.subject: V-Guard Industries Ltd - 532953 - Announcement Under Regulation 30
announcements.detail: Announcement under Regulation 30
announcements.ai_summary: V-Guard Industries Ltd has received an Assessment Order from the Assessment Unit, National Faceless Assessment Centre, Income-tax Department. The company has declared that the information provided in Annexure I, in compliance with Regulation 30(13) of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, is true, correct, and complete to the best of its knowledge. The company has requested the BSE Limited and the National Stock Exchange of India Limited to take this information on record. The specific details of the Assessment Order, including any financial implications or demands, are expected to be further elaborated in Annexure I, which is not provided here. The next steps involve the company's internal review and potential response to the Income-tax Department.

announcements.subject: Ceigall India Ltd - 544223 - Cancellation Of Tenders Due To Administrative Reasons.
announcements.detail: In continuation of our earlier letter dated March 17, 2026, intimating regarding Ceigall Infra Projects Private Limited ('CIPPL'), a wholly owned subsidiary of Ceigall India Limited ('CIL'), emerging as L1 bidder (Aggregate bid cost of Rs. 207 Crores),  in the financial bid opening for two (2) tenders by Punjab Infrastructure Development Board, this is to inform that as per the information available on the Official e-Procurement portal of the Government ....
announcements.ai_summary: Ceigall India Limited (CIL) has announced the cancellation of two tenders by the Punjab Infrastructure Development Board, for which its wholly owned subsidiary, Ceigall Infra Projects Private Limited (CIPPL), had emerged as the L1 bidder. The aggregate bid cost for these two tenders was Rs. 207 Crores. The cancellation, effective March 24, 2026, is due to administrative reasons, as communicated via email on the same date. The cancelled tenders were for the Construction and Development of World Class Urban Streets in Ludhiana on a Hybrid Annuity Model, specifically Package 1 (Tender ID: 2026_DOF_158211_2) and Package 3 (Tender ID: 2026_DOF_158228_2). This announcement follows an earlier intimation on March 17, 2026, regarding CIPPL's L1 status.

announcements.subject: Hazoor Multi Projects Ltd-$ - 532467 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Updates on Acquisition
announcements.detail: Update regarding conversion of its existing investment in optionally convertible debentures of its wholly owned subsidiary, M/s. Square Port Shipyard Private Limited into equity shares of the said wholly owned subsidiary.
announcements.ai_summary: Hazoor Multi Projects Ltd has approved an extension for its Optionally Convertible Debentures (OCDs) amounting to Rs. 25 Crores, held in its wholly owned subsidiary, Square Port Shipyard Private Limited. The tenure of these 0.01% OCDs has been extended by one year, from April 9, 2026, to April 9, 2027. Additionally, the company has approved a modification to the existing security arrangements, which include a property located at Navase, Taluka Dapoli, District Ratnagiri, Maharashtra. This follows previous intimations on January 27, 2026, and February 28, 2026, regarding the conversion of these OCDs into equity shares. The next steps involve the formal execution of the modified security and the continued monitoring of the subsidiary's performance.

announcements.company: Brookfield India Real Estate Trust REIT
announcements.subject: Brookfield India Real Estate Trust REIT - 543261 - Reg 23(5)(i): Disclosure of material issue
announcements.detail: Brookfield India Real Estate Trust REIT has informed the Exchange regarding Disclosure of material issue
announcements.ai_summary: Brookprop Management Services Private Limited, acting as the manager for Brookfield India Real Estate Trust REIT, conducted meetings with various institutional investors between March 20, 2026, and March 24, 2026. These meetings provided business and financial updates for Brookfield India REIT for the quarter and nine months ending December 31, 2025. The company has informed BSE Limited and the National Stock Exchange of India Limited about these investor interactions. Investors can refer to the company's website, https://www.brookfieldindiareit.in/, for further information. No specific financial figures or deal terms were disclosed in this announcement.

announcements.subject: Modern Engineering And Projects Ltd - 539762 - Board Meeting Outcome for For Board Meeting Held On 24/03/2026
announcements.detail: Refer the attached intimation
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Modern Engineering And Projects Ltd met on March 24, 2026, and approved the appointment of Mrs. Devanshi Kevin Shah as the new Company Secretary & Compliance Officer, effective from March 24, 2026. The Board also approved availing an Inter-Corporate Deposit (ICD) from a related party on terms to be finalized. This transaction, while classified as a related party transaction under Section 188 of the Companies Act, 2013, is not considered material and therefore does not require shareholder approval. The company stated that the ICD is in the ordinary course of business and will be conducted on an arm's length basis. The next steps involve the formalization of the ICD terms and compliance with relevant regulations.

announcements.subject: Nilkanth Engineering Ltd - 512004 - Compliance-57 (4) : Prior intimation to the beginning  of the quarter
announcements.detail: In terms of Regulation 57(4) of SEBI(LODR) Regulations, 2015, this is to inform you that Since the Company has not issued any debt / interest carrying instruments, there will not by any payment towards interest in the ensuing Quarter April, 2026 to June, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Nilkanth Engineering Limited has informed BSE that, in accordance with Regulation 57(4) of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, there will be no interest payments due in the upcoming quarter from April 2026 to June 2026. This is because the company has not issued any debt or interest-carrying instruments. The company has made this disclosure to ensure compliance with regulatory requirements and has requested that this information be recorded.

announcements.subject: Aditya Birla Capital Ltd - 540691 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Allotment
announcements.detail: Aditya Birla Capital Limited has informed the Stock Exchanges regarding allotment of its Non-Convertible Debentures
announcements.ai_summary: Aditya Birla Capital Limited has successfully allotted 25,000 Unsecured, Rated, Listed, Taxable, Redeemable Subordinated Non-Convertible Debentures. Each debenture has a face value of Rs. 1,00,000, resulting in an aggregate amount of Rs. 250 crore raised through a private placement to identified investors. This allotment was made on March 24, 2026, in compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, and the SEBI (Issue and Listing of Non-Convertible Securities) Regulations, 2021. The company has provided the necessary details to BSE Limited and the National Stock Exchange of India Ltd.

announcements.subject: Natco Pharma Ltd - 524816 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Scheme of Arrangement
announcements.detail: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.ai_summary: Natco Pharma Limited's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on March 24, 2026, approved a Scheme of Arrangement. This scheme involves a demerger of NATCO Pharma Limited (the "Demerged Company") into Natco Crop Health Sciences Limited (the "Resulting Company"). The approval was granted under Sections 230 to 232 of the Companies Act, 2013, following recommendations from the Audit Committee. This arrangement is subject to further approvals from shareholders, creditors, and relevant regulatory bodies, including the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT). The company had previously intimated a board meeting on September 25, 2025, regarding this matter.

announcements.subject: TCPL Packaging Ltd-$ - 523301 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Updates on Acquisition
announcements.detail: Intimation under Reg. 30
announcements.ai_summary: TCPL Packaging Limited has further invested in its wholly-owned subsidiary, Creative Offset Printers Private Limited (COPPL), through a Rights Issue. The company has been allotted 40,317 equity shares, aggregating to Rs. 2.29 crore. Despite this investment, TCPL Packaging Limited's shareholding percentage in COPPL remains unchanged as it was already a wholly-owned subsidiary. COPPL reported a total revenue of Rs. 48.62 Crores for the Financial Year 2024-2025. This announcement is made under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: KCP Sugar & Industries Corporation Ltd - 533192 - Disclosure Under Regulation 29(2) Of Securities And Exchange Board Of India (Substantial Acquisition Of Shares And Takeovers) Regulations, 2011
announcements.detail: Disclosure under Regulation 29(2) of Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011
announcements.ai_summary: KCP Sugar & Industries Corporation Ltd has received a disclosure regarding the acquisition of equity shares from the open market. The disclosure, made pursuant to Regulation 29(2) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, details the number of shares purchased and the percentage of total issued and paid-up share capital acquired by an unnamed acquirer. Further details on the mode of acquisition and the specific acquirer are expected to be provided in the full disclosure document. This announcement signals a change in shareholding for KCP Sugar & Industries Corporation Ltd.

announcements.subject: Cosmic CRF Ltd - 543928 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Receipt of Purchase Order of Rs. 3,254.05 lakhs from various Indian Railways Divisions, disclosure under  Regulation 30 read with Schedule III of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.
announcements.ai_summary: Cosmic CRF Limited announced on March 24, 2026, that it has secured new purchase orders totaling Rs. 3,254.05 Lakhs (inclusive of GST) from various Indian Railways divisions, including Northern Railway, Southern Railway, and North Central Railway. This significant development, disclosed under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, includes specific order values from different railway divisions. The company has provided annexures detailing these orders as per SEBI circular SEBI/HO/CFD/CFD-PoD-1/CIR/2023/123 dated July 13, 2023.

announcements.subject: Ashika Credit Capital Ltd - 543766 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Acquisition
announcements.detail: Please be informed that the Company today i.e, 24.03.2026, has acquired 20,00,000 Optionally Convertible Redeemable Preference Shares (OCRPS) of Rs. 10 each of Ashika Private Equity Advisors Private Limited, a Subsidiary of the Company.
announcements.ai_summary: Ashika Credit Capital Limited announced on March 24, 2026, that it has acquired 2,000,000 Optionally Convertible Redeemable Preference Shares (OCRPS) of Rs. 10 each from Ashika Private Equity Advisors Private Limited, a subsidiary of the company. This acquisition is disclosed under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The company is committed to providing accurate and adequate disclosures regarding its business activities and strategic investments.

announcements.subject: Waaree Energies Ltd - 544277 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Acquisition
announcements.detail: Outcome of Board Meeting- Acquisition
announcements.ai_summary: On March 24, 2026, the Board of Directors of Waaree Energies Ltd approved the acquisition of an additional equity stake in its subsidiary, Waaree Transpower Private Limited (formerly Kotsons Private Limited). The company will increase its holding from the current 64.04% to 75.10% of the paid-up equity share capital. Additionally, the Board approved a capital expenditure of Rs. 3900 crores for a glass manufacturing plant in its wholly owned subsidiary, Waaree Green Glas. These decisions are subject to further regulatory approvals and internal processes.

announcements.subject: WPIL Ltd - 505872 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Diversification / Disinvestment
announcements.detail: Sale of Company''s Shareholding in its Australian Subsidiary
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of WPIL Ltd, in a meeting held on March 24, 2026, approved the sale of its entire shareholding in its Australian subsidiary, Sterling Pumps Pty Limited. This decision marks a divestment from its international operations. The Board Meeting commenced at 11:00 a.m. and concluded at 11:45 a.m. Further details regarding the consolidated turnover of Sterling Pumps Pty Limited are enclosed. The company will proceed with the necessary steps to complete this transaction.

announcements.subject: SRG Housing Finance Ltd - 534680 - Compliances-Reg. 57 (1) - Certificate of interest payment/Principal in case of NCD
announcements.detail: Certificate of Monthly payment of NCD - March 2026 (INE559N07066)
announcements.ai_summary: SRG Housing Finance Ltd has made the monthly interest and principal payment on its secured redeemable Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) (ISIN: INE559N07066). The total issue size of these NCDs is Rs. 26,00,00,000/-, comprising 2,600 debentures with a face value of INR 1,00,000/- each, including a Green Shoe Option of INR 1,00,00,000/-. The interest amount paid on the due date, March 24, 2026, was Rs. 21,58,433.84/-. The interest payment record date was March 9, 2026. This intimation is provided to BSE Limited (Scrip Code- 977242) in accordance with Regulations 30 and 57(1) of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Indian Overseas Bank - 532388 - Compliances-Reg. 57 (1) - Certificate of interest payment/Principal in case of NCD
announcements.detail: Payment of Annual Interest on Bonds - INE565A08050
announcements.ai_summary: Indian Overseas Bank has successfully made its annual interest payment on BASEL III Tier-II Bonds Series V (ISIN: INE565A08050). The total issue size of these bonds is Rs. 1000 Crore. The interest amount paid on the due date, March 24, 2026, was Rs. 90,00,00,000/-. The interest payment record date was March 9, 2026. This confirmation is in compliance with Regulation 57 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, and has been submitted to BSE Limited (BSE SCRIP CODE: 532388) and National Stock Exchange Ltd. (NSE SCRIP CODE: IOB).

announcements.subject: Bank of Maharashtra - 532525 - Compliances-Reg. 57 (1) - Certificate of interest payment/Principal in case of NCD
announcements.detail: Annual Interest payment on bonds INE457A8100
announcements.ai_summary: Bank of Maharashtra has confirmed the payment of annual interest on its BASEL III Compliant Tier I Bonds (ISIN: INE457A08100). The total issue size of these bonds is Rs. 290.00 crore. The annual interest amount paid on the due date, March 24, 2026, was Rs. 25,37,50,000.00, inclusive of TDS. The interest payment record date was March 9, 2026. This disclosure is made pursuant to Regulation 57(1) of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, to BSE Ltd. (Scrip Code: 532525) and National Stock Exchange of India Ltd. (Scrip Code: MAHABANK).

announcements.subject: J.A. Finance Ltd - 543860 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of The Meeting Of Independent Directors
announcements.detail: Outcome of the Meeting of Independent Directors
announcements.ai_summary: The Independent Directors of J. A. Finance Limited convened a meeting on March 24, 2026, from 3:00 PM to 4:00 PM. During this session, they reviewed the performance of the Non-Independent Directors and the Board as a whole. Additionally, the Chairman's performance was assessed, incorporating feedback from Executive and Non-Executive Directors. The directors also evaluated the quality, quantity, and timeliness of information flow between the company's management and the Board, ensuring effective performance of their duties. This outcome is for the information and records of BSE Limited (Scrip Code: 543860) and The Calcutta Stock Exchange Limited (Scrip Code: 20067).

announcements.subject: Fedbank Financial Services Ltd - 544027 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Allotment
announcements.detail: Allotment of Unsecured, Rated, Subordinated, Listed, Redeemable, Non-Convertible Debentures for an aggregate sum of Rs. 450 Crores on a private Placement Basis
announcements.ai_summary: Fedbank Financial Services Ltd has successfully completed the allotment of Unsecured, Rated, Subordinated, Listed, Redeemable, Non-Convertible Debentures. The aggregate sum raised through this private placement is Rs. 450 Crores. This issuance is a significant fund-raising activity for the company. The company has provided multiple ISINs for these debentures, including INE007N08023, INE007N07041, INE007N08015, INE007N07058, INE007N07033, and INE007N07066. This announcement follows previous board meetings and AGM disclosures related to this fundraising initiative.

announcements.subject: Gujarat Apollo Industries Ltd - 522217 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Preferential Issue
announcements.detail: Receipt of Trading Approval
announcements.ai_summary: Gujarat Apollo Industries Limited has received trading approval for 11,70,000 equity shares of face value Rs. 10 each, issued on a preferential basis. Both BSE Limited and National Stock Exchange of India Limited (NSE) granted this approval on March 23, 2026, with trading commencing on March 24, 2026. This preferential allotment is a form of fund raising for the company. The trading approval is subject to compliance with lock-in provisions under Regulation 167 of SEBI (Issue of Capital and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2018. Investors should note the terms of this preferential issue and any associated lock-in periods for the newly traded shares.

announcements.subject: Prime Fresh Ltd - 540404 - Business Update
announcements.detail: Business Update with respect to PFL''s Growth Journey during FY26
announcements.ai_summary: Prime Fresh Limited (PFL), a fully integrated Agri value chain company, has announced a significant upgrade in its credit profile. The credit rating agency CRISIL has assigned a BBB (Stable) rating to PFL's Rs. 100 crore debt. This upgrade signifies improved financial stability and debt servicing capability, reflecting growing confidence in the management's execution. This development is part of PFL's growth journey during FY26, indicating a strengthening financial position for the company. Investors should monitor how this improved credit rating may impact future funding opportunities and operational expansion.

announcements.subject: DIC India Ltd - 500089 - Regulation 30 Disclosure Regarding Mediation Proceedings Before The Delhi High Court Mediation And Conciliation Centre And The Fact About The Proceedings Before The Indian Council Of Arbitration ('ICA') Being Kept In Abeyance.
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed disclosure regarding mediation proceedings.
announcements.ai_summary: DIC India Limited provided an update on March 24, 2026, regarding mediation proceedings before the Delhi High Court Mediation and Conciliation Centre and arbitration proceedings before the Indian Council of Arbitration (ICA). The company confirmed that the ICA proceedings have been kept in abeyance. This disclosure is made in furtherance to the company's previous filing on May 06, 2025, and adheres to Regulation 30 and Schedule III of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, as per SEBI Circular SEBI/HO/CFD/CFD-PoD-1/CIR/2023/123 dated July 13, 2023.

announcements.subject: Tata Steel Ltd - 500470 - Tata Steel Limited - News Clarification
announcements.detail: Tata Steel Limited - News Clarification
announcements.ai_summary: Tata Steel Limited has clarified its partnership with Hindustan Zinc Limited to integrate 'EcoZen', a low-carbon zinc solution, into its galvanised steel manufacturing. This collaboration, announced on March 24, 2026, is a normal business arrangement aligned with Tata Steel's sustainability goals and low-carbon steel-making ambitions. The company stated that this arrangement does not require disclosure under Regulation 30 of the SEBI Listing Regulations. Tata Steel regularly enters into various strategic, commercial, and operational partnerships to further its business objectives and maintains robust processes for timely and accurate disclosures.

announcements.subject: Veranda Learning Solutions Ltd - 543514 - Letter To Shareholders - Notice Of Meeting Of The Equity Shareholders
announcements.detail: Letter to shareholders - Notice of Meeting of the Equity Shareholders
announcements.ai_summary: Veranda Learning Solutions Ltd has informed shareholders via a letter on March 24, 2026, regarding the Notice of Meeting of Equity Shareholders. This meeting is being convened as per the directions of the National Company Law Tribunal, Chennai Bench. The company has sent letters to shareholders whose email addresses are not registered, providing a weblink to access the Notice of Meeting on the company's website, www.verandalearning.com. This communication follows a previous letter dated March 23, 2026. The company has requested that this information be taken on record by BSE Limited and the National Stock Exchange of India Limited.

announcements.subject: Trishakti Industries Ltd - 531279 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Disclosure under Regulation -30 of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligation and Disclosure Requirements) Regulation, 2015 - PRESS RELEASE - Guided vs. Actual Capex Summary - 90 % ahead of guidance.
announcements.ai_summary: Trishakti Industries Ltd has significantly exceeded its capital expenditure (CapEx) guidance for FY26, deploying approximately ₹190 crore, which is 90% ahead of its projected ₹100 crore. This substantial investment brings the company's cumulative fleet investment to ₹240 crore, indicating strong operational utilization. The company announced this update via a press release on March 24, 2026, highlighting a high-growth inflection. The press release, also available on their website www.trishakti.com, details the CapEx summary and its positive implications. Managing Director Suresh Jhanwar (DIN: 00568879) signed off on the disclosure to BSE Limited and The Calcutta Stock Exchange Limited.

announcements.subject:
Balgopal Commercial Ltd - 539834 - Disclosure As Per Regulation 7(2) Of SEBI (Prohibition Of Insider
Trading) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Disclosures
announcements.ai_summary: Balgopal Commercial Ltd announced on March 24, 2026, that it has received disclosures from its promoters, Mr. Sandeep Jindal and Mr. Vijay Yadav, regarding the acquisition of equity shares. This acquisition is a direct result of the conversion of warrants previously allotted to them on a preferential basis. The company has submitted these disclosures in Form C, as required by Regulation 7(2) of the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015. The Company Secretary and Compliance Officer, Ankit Ladha, confirmed that these disclosures are for the record and have been filed with the BSE Limited.

announcements.subject: TVS Holdings Ltd - 520056 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Allotment
announcements.detail: Allotment of 65000 Non-Convertible Debentures
announcements.ai_summary: TVS Holdings Ltd, formerly Sundaram-Clayton Limited, announced on March 24, 2026, the allotment of 65,000 Senior, Rated, Unsecured, Listed, Redeemable, Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs). Each NCD has a face value of INR 1 Lakh, and the total subscription amount received from identified investors is Rs. 650,00,00,000 (Rupees Six Hundred and Fifty Crores). This allotment was approved by the Asset Liability Management Committee of Directors, authorized by the Board, based on successful bidding on the NSE EBP Platform. This follows previous communications on July 31, 2025, and January 28, 2026.

announcements.subject: India Homes Ltd - 513361 - Board Meeting Outcome for Conversion Of Loan In To Equity Shares Of The Company
announcements.detail: Approval of Issue of up to 15070000 equity shares of Rs. 1/- each upon conversion of unsecured loan at a price of Rs.14.60 per equity share.
announcements.ai_summary: India Homes Ltd's Board of Directors met on March 24, 2026, and approved the issuance of up to 15,070,000 equity shares of Rs. 1 each. These shares will be issued at a price of Rs. 14.60 per share, including a premium of Rs. 13.60 per share, upon the conversion of an unsecured loan. The issuance is specifically to persons belonging to the Promoter category and is subject to the approval of BSE. This conversion is in accordance with the Companies Act, 2013, and SEBI ICDR Regulations, ensuring the issue price is not lower than the determined price. The meeting was held at the company's corporate office in Mumbai.

announcements.subject: Mafatlal Industries Ltd-$ - 500264 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of The Board Meeting - 24Th March 2026.
announcements.detail:
The Board of Directors at their meeting held today i.e. on 24th March 2026, approved the Notice of the Postal Ballot for seeking consent of members of the company for the following items of special business:
I. Approval to advance any loan/give guarantee/provide security u/s 185 of the Companies Act, 2013.
II. To increase in threshold of loans/guarantees, providing of securities and making of investments in securities under section 186 of the Companies Act, 2013.
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Mafatlal Industries Ltd met on March 24, 2026, and approved a Notice of Postal Ballot to seek shareholder consent for two key proposals. Firstly, the company seeks approval to advance loans, give guarantees, or provide security under Section 185 of the Companies Act, 2013. Secondly, they aim to increase the threshold for loans, guarantees, securities, and investments in securities under Section 186 of the Companies Act, 2013. Shareholders will be able to vote on these resolutions, with the cut-off date for determining eligibility set as April 17, 2026. The board meeting commenced at 11:30 am and concluded at 2:04 pm.

announcements.subject: RIR Power Electronics Ltd - 517035 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Submission of Press Release
announcements.ai_summary: RIR Power Electronics Ltd announced on March 24, 2026, the successful development of a cutting-edge 25 kilovolt (kV) – 120 kiloampere (kA) High-Voltage Thyristor Switch. This indigenous development reinforces the government's 'Make in India' initiative by introducing India's first indigenously developed 25 kV high-voltage thyristor switch for advanced pulse power applications. The breakthrough is expected to strengthen domestic manufacturing expertise, reduce reliance on imports, and enhance India's competitiveness in the global power electronics market. This innovation is a significant milestone in India's high-power electronics capabilities.

announcements.subject: Purple Finance Ltd - 544191 - Board Comments On The Fine Levied By BSE Limited.
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed Board Comment on the fine levied by BSE Limited.
announcements.ai_summary: Purple Finance Ltd's Board of Directors reviewed and commented on a fine levied by BSE Limited for non-compliance with Regulation 60(2) of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015, concerning delayed continuous disclosures. The notice of delayed compliance was placed before the Board at their meeting held on March 24, 2026. The company informed the Board that it has since complied with the requirement of Regulation 60(2) by submitting the necessary filings. This action is in response to a mail received from BSE Limited on February 27, 2026, and relates to SEBI circular no. SEBI/HO/DDHS/DDHS_Div1/P/CIR/2022/0000000103 dated July 29, 2022.

announcements.subject: KP Green Engineering Ltd - 544150 - Press Release - KP Group Surpasses 1 GW Energised IPP Capacity Milestone
announcements.detail: KP Green Engineering Limited has informed the exchange regarding Press Release titled 'KP Group surpasses 1 GW energised IPP capacity milestone'. The disclosure is attached herewith
announcements.ai_summary: KP Green Engineering Limited announced that the KP Group has surpassed a significant milestone by achieving 1 GW of energised Independent Power Producer (IPP) capacity, out of its total IPP portfolio of 2.3 GW. This achievement, reported on March 24, 2026, marks a substantial step in the Group's long-term growth strategy focused on IPP development. Since FY21, the Group has demonstrated approximately 18x growth in energised capacity from 58 MW. This scale-up highlights the Group's strategic focus on building a high-quality, owned IPP portfolio with strong execution discipline, with substantial capacity additions and multiple projects commissioned ahead of schedule in FY26.

announcements.subject: Goodyear India Ltd - 500168 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of The Board Meeting Held On March 24, 2026
announcements.detail: Outcome of the Board Meeting held on March 24, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Goodyear India Ltd met on March 24, 2026, and noted the resignation of Mr. Abhishek Arora from the position of Director – Human Resource, India, effective April 20, 2026, as he is exploring external growth opportunities. Mr. Arora will also cease to be Senior Management Personnel on this date. Following the recommendation of the Nomination and Remuneration Committee, the Board approved the appointment of Mr. Vishal Dhingra as HR Director, South Asia (Senior Management Personnel), effective April 21, 2026. These changes are in compliance with SEBI LODR Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Garnet Construction Ltd - 526727 - Outcome Of Board Meeting Updated Again With The Missing Annexure.
announcements.detail: Attached herewith is the outcome of the Board meeting which was held on 21st March 2026. along with the details in the Annexure A.
announcements.ai_summary: Garnet Construction Ltd has updated the outcome of its Board Meeting held on March 21, 2026, with a missing annexure. The Board acknowledged the demise of Promoter, Managing Director & CFO Mr. Kishankumar Kedia (DIN 205146) and expressed its condolences. Subsequently, the Board approved the appointment of Ms. Chahat Sanjaykumar Kedia (DIN 11621550) as a Director, subject to necessary approvals, and Ms. Nikita Poddar as the new Chief Financial Officer (CFO). The detailed disclosures required under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, are provided in Annexure A, which was submitted with the revised disclosure dated March 23, 2026.

announcements.subject: Bondada Engineering Ltd - 543971 - Intimation Of New Bank Limits And Enhancement Of Bank Limits.
announcements.detail: Intimation of new bank limits and enhancement of bank limits.
announcements.ai_summary: Bondada Engineering Limited has secured fresh bank limits and enhancements to its existing credit facilities, strengthening its financial flexibility and execution capabilities. The company announced on March 24, 2026, that it has received new sanctions from Punjab National Bank (PNB) and enhanced limits from HDFC Bank and CSB Bank. These facilities are crucial for the company's ongoing operations and future projects. The specific details of the sanctioned and enhanced credit facilities, including fund and non-fund-based limits, are provided in the announcement. This update is made in accordance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: KS Smart Technologies Ltd - 516038 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Intimation towards receipt of order from Kerala State Electronics Development Corporation Limited to the Company.
announcements.ai_summary: KS Smart Technologies Ltd has announced the receipt of a significant purchase order from Kerala State Electronics Development Corporation Ltd (KELTRON), a Government of Kerala Undertaking. The order, valued at approximately ₹4.38 Crores (excluding taxes), involves the deployment of digital display infrastructure comprising 2,233 units across Anganwadi centres in Tamil Nadu. The scope of the project includes supply, installation, testing, commissioning, and ensuring operational readiness of the equipment. This end-to-end implementation mandate highlights the company's capabilities in distributed technology deployment and service delivery. The disclosure, made on March 24, 2026, is in compliance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Indegene Ltd - 544172 - Clarification Letter
announcements.detail: Clarification Letter
announcements.ai_summary: Indegene Limited has responded to a clarification request from BSE Limited regarding a significant increase in the price and volume of its shares. In a letter dated March 24, 2026, the company confirmed that as of that date, there is no pending information or undisclosed material event that could significantly impact its securities' price or trading volume. The company attributes the recent market movements and volatility to prevailing market conditions and investor sentiment. Indegene Limited, through its Company Secretary and Compliance Officer Srishti Ramesh Kaushik, reiterated its commitment to transparent and timely disclosures as per SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. Investors should note that no specific material event has been identified as the cause for the recent trading activity.

announcements.subject: Kajal Synthetics & Silk Mills Ltd - 512147 - Compliance-57 (4) : Prior intimation to the beginning  of the quarter
announcements.detail: In terms of Regulation 57(4) of SEBI(LODR) Regulations, 2015, this is to inform you that Since the Company has not issued any debts / interest carrying instrument, there will not be any payment due towards interest in the ensuing quarter April, 2026 to June, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: The company, Kajal Synthetics & Silk Mills Ltd, has informed BSE Limited that it will not have any interest payments due in the upcoming quarter, April 2026 to June 2026. This is because the company has not issued any debt or interest-bearing instruments. This disclosure is made in compliance with Regulation 57(4) of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The Managing Director, Seetha Ramaiya K Vellore (DIN 08216198), signed the intimation dated March 24, 2026. No further action is required from investors at this time, as this is a routine compliance update.

announcements.subject: Meenakshi Steel Industries Ltd - 512505 - Compliance-57 (4) : Prior intimation to the beginning  of the quarter
announcements.detail: In terms of Regulation 57(4) of SEBI(LODR) Regulations, 2015, this is to inform you that since the Company has not issued any debt / interest carrying instruments, there will not be any payment due towards interest in the ensuing Quarter April, 26 to June, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Meenakshi Steel Industries Limited has complied with Regulation 57(4) of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, by providing prior intimation for the start of the quarter. On March 24, 2026, the company informed BSE Limited that it has not issued any debt or interest-bearing instruments. As a result, no interest payments are due for the upcoming quarter, from April 2026 to June 2026. This notification has been recorded by the exchange.

announcements.subject: Mansoon Trading Company Ltd - 512303 - Compliance-57 (4) : Prior intimation to the beginning  of the quarter
announcements.detail: In terms of Regulation 57(4) of SEBI(LODR) Regulations, 2015 this is to inform you that Since the Company has not issued any debt / interest carrying instruments, there will not be any payment of dues towards towards interest in the ensuing Quarter April, 26 to June, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Mansoon Trading Company Ltd has provided prior intimation for the beginning of the quarter, as required by Regulation 57(4) of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The company stated on March 24, 2026, that it has not issued any debt or interest-carrying instruments. Consequently, there will be no payment of dues towards interest for the ensuing quarter, which spans from April 2026 to June 2026. This information has been submitted to BSE Limited for record.

announcements.subject: ITCONS E-Solutions Ltd - 543806 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Memorandum of Understanding /Agreements
announcements.detail: The Company is pleased to inform that it has entered into agreement with Pay10 Services Private Limited (Formerly known as Bhartipay Services Private Limited) for providing trained and skilled personnel on a contractual basis and recruitment of candidate for permanent employment. For further details, please refer attached file
announcements.ai_summary: ITCONS E-Solutions Ltd has entered into an agreement with Pay10 Services Private Limited, a Fintech company. This agreement is for providing trained and skilled personnel on a contractual basis and for recruiting candidates for permanent employment. The company expects this partnership to create future growth opportunities and generate profit.

announcements.subject: Tyche Industries Ltd - 532384 - Intimation Regarding Receipt Of ANVISA, Brazil GMP Certificate For  The Company''s Manufacturing Facility Located At Kakinada, Andhra Pradesh.
announcements.detail: Please find attached the intimation regarding receipt of ANVISA, Brazil GMP certificate for the Company''s Manufacturing facility located at Kakinada, Andhra Pradesh.
announcements.ai_summary: Tyche Industries Ltd has received a Certificate of GMP Compliance from ANVISA, Brazil for its manufacturing facility in Kakinada, Andhra Pradesh. This certificate is valid for two years, from March 16, 2026, to March 16, 2028. This follows a successful GMP inspection previously intimated on September 11, 2025.

announcements.subject: Sodhani Capital Ltd - 544560 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Amendments to Memorandum & Articles of Association
announcements.detail: Sodhani capital limited has informed to the exchange in regards with the Alteration of the Main Object clause in the Memorandum of Association of the Company subject to the Approval of the Members of the Company,  Registrar of Companies authority department, bodies as and to the extend necessary
announcements.ai_summary: Sodhani Capital Ltd's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on March 24, 2026, approved an alteration to the company's Memorandum of Association. This includes adding new sub-clauses to carry on the business of a Direct Selling Agent (DSA), referral agent, facilitator, and service provider for financial institutions. This is subject to member and regulatory approvals.

announcements.subject: Sodhani Capital Ltd - 544560 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of The Board Meeting Held On 24Th March, 2026
announcements.detail: Outcome of the Board Meeting held on 24th March, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Sodhani Capital Ltd's Board of Directors met on March 24, 2026. They approved an alteration to the company's Memorandum of Association (MOA) to include carrying on the business of a Direct Selling Agent (DSA), referral agent, facilitator, and service provider for financial institutions. This alteration is subject to member and regulatory approvals.

announcements.subject: Union Bank of India - 532477 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Allotment
announcements.detail: Issue of Long - Term Bonds for financing of Infrastructure and affordable housing.
announcements.ai_summary: Union Bank of India will issue Long-Term Bonds worth ₹7,500 Crore to finance infrastructure and affordable housing. The issue has a base size of ₹3,000 Crore and a greenshoe option of ₹4,500 Crore, to be placed privately. These are unsecured, redeemable, non-convertible debentures with a 10-year tenor and a coupon rate of 7.16% p.a., rated "CARE AAA/Stable" and "ICRA AAA /Stable".

announcements.subject: Whirlpool of India Ltd - 500238 - General Updated - Communication To Proxy Advisory Firms
announcements.detail: As enclosed
announcements.ai_summary: Whirlpool of India Ltd is communicating clarifications to proxy advisory firms, Institutional Investor Advisory Services India Limited (IiAS) and Stakeholders Empowerment Services (SES). These clarifications are in response to voting recommendations regarding the proposed re-designation of Mr. Anil Berera as a Non-Executive Independent Director. The company is seeking shareholder approval via postal ballot for this re-designation.

announcements.subject: KPI Green Energy Ltd - 542323 - Press Release - KPI Green Energy Limited Successfully Energises 965 Mwp Capacity Out Of Its 2.17 Gwp Independent Power Producer (IPP) Portfolio
announcements.detail: KPI Green Energy Limited has informed the exchange regarding Press Release titled 'KPI Green Energy Limited Successfully Energises 965 MWp Capacity out of its 2.17 GWp Independent Power Producer (IPP) Portfolio'. The disclosure is attached herewith.
announcements.ai_summary: KPI Green Energy Limited has successfully energized 965 MWp capacity out of its 2.17 GWp Independent Power Producer (IPP) portfolio. This achievement reinforces the company's transition to an asset-backed IPP model, complemented by its EPC expertise, and highlights a sustainable annuity revenue stream from long-term contracted projects.

announcements.subject: Kilburn Engineering Ltd - 522101 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: We submit herewith details of orders amounting to Rs. 5458 lakhs bagged by the company since the previous announcement dated 28th January 2026. The orders received are in ordinary course of business.
announcements.ai_summary: Kilburn Engineering Limited has received new orders totaling Rs. 5458 lakhs since its last announcement on January 28, 2026. These orders include Rotary Dryers for Limestone (Rs. 1985 lakhs), Paddle Dryer & Cooler for Palm Oil (Rs. 1500 lakhs), VFBDs & Band Dryer (Rs. 912 lakhs), and Tea Dryers (Rs. 265 lakhs), along with Service/Spares/Others (Rs. 796 lakhs).

announcements.subject: Mobavenue AI Tech Ltd - 539682 - 'Mobavenue' Recognized With Two Gold Awards At Adtech Honours By Ad:Tech India.
announcements.detail: ''Mobavenue'' recognized with two gold Awards at the AdTech Honours by ad:tech India
announcements.ai_summary: Mobavenue Media Private Limited (MMPL), a wholly owned subsidiary of Mobavenue AI Tech Limited, has won two Gold awards at the AdTech Honours by ad:tech India. The awards were for "Programmatic & Emerging Media – Connected TV Advertising" and "AI & Creative Automation – AI-Driven Dynamic Creative Optimisation," recognizing MMPL's advancements in digital advertising.

announcements.subject: Tata Power Company Ltd - 500400 - Regulation 30 -Update
announcements.detail: Regulation 30 -Update
announcements.ai_summary: Tata Power Company Ltd has executed a Supplementary Power Purchase Agreement for its Mundra Plant with GUVNL (Gujarat). This agreement will also be executed with the states of Maharashtra, Rajasthan, Punjab, and Haryana. This update follows the temporary suspension of operations at its Mundra units.

announcements.subject: Bhandari Hosiery Exports Ltd - 512608 - Corporate Action-Outcome of Right issue
announcements.detail: Right issue committee approved allotment of 9,29,06,781 equity shares.
announcements.ai_summary: Bhandari Hosiery Exports Ltd has approved the allotment of 9,29,06,781 equity shares. These shares were issued at a price of Rs. 2.56 per share, including a premium of Rs. 1.56. The company will initiate the listing process for these allotted shares shortly.

announcements.subject: HDFC Bank Ltd - 500180 - Rumour verification - Regulation 30(11)
announcements.detail: Clarification on a news article
announcements.ai_summary: HDFC Bank Ltd clarified a news article regarding the firing of three senior executives. The bank referenced a September 26, 2025, intimation about a decision notice from the Dubai Financial Services Authority (DFSA) concerning its Dubai branch. An internal investigation was directed by the Governance, Nomination and Remuneration Committee, with findings submitted to the Disciplinary Committee.

announcements.subject: Nitco Ltd - 532722 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Allotment
announcements.detail: Allotment of Equity Shares pursuant to exercise of share warrants
announcements.ai_summary: Nitco Ltd announced the allotment of equity shares following the exercise of share warrants. This allotment was approved by shareholders at an Extraordinary General Meeting on November 15, 2024. The company had previously received in-principle approval for this issuance from BSE Limited and the National Stock Exchange of India Limited in January 2025.

announcements.subject: Kriti Nutrients Ltd - 533210 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Amendments to Memorandum & Articles of Association
announcements.detail: Submission of Approved and Adopted Articles of Association of the Company.
announcements.ai_summary: Kriti Nutrients Ltd has submitted the approved and adopted Articles of Association following an Extraordinary General Meeting held on March 20, 2026. The new articles include the insertion of Article No. 92 after Article No. 91. This submission is in compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: John Cockerill India Ltd-$ - 500147 - Intimation Of Waiver Of Advance Payment And Consummation Of Closing Under The Provisions Of Share Purchase Agreement Dated December 19, 2025.
announcements.detail: In furtherance to the above, we wish to inform you that, on further request of the company, JC SA has granted the second waiver for the payment of the purchase price advance, aggregating to an amount Euro 5,000,000/- (Euro Five Million) by the company to JC SA up to June 30, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: John Cockerill India Limited has received a second waiver from its parent company, JC SA, regarding an advance payment under a Share Purchase Agreement (SPA) dated December 19, 2025. JC SA has extended the deadline for the company to pay the purchase price advance, originally aggregating to Euro 5,000,000, up to June 30, 2026. This waiver is a continuation of previous communications, including the initial SPA execution on December 19, 2025, and a prior waiver granted until March 31, 2026. The SPA concerns the acquisition of the entire equity shareholding of John Cockerill Metals International SA, Belgium, from JC SA.

announcements.company: Manoj Vaibhav Gems N Jewellers Ltd
announcements.subject: Manoj Vaibhav Gems N Jewellers Ltd - 543995 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 Of LODR Regulations
announcements.detail: Announcement under Regulation 30 of SEBI LODR Regulations
announcements.ai_summary: Manoj Vaibhav Gems N Jewellers Ltd announced on March 23, 2026, that its Audit Committee and Board of Directors have approved the execution of a Franchise Agreement with M/s. Gontla Trading LLP. This approval is in accordance with Regulation 30 and Regulation 23 read with Schedule III of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The company has informed both BSE Limited and the National Stock Exchange of India Limited about this development. Further details regarding the agreement are expected to be disclosed following the board's approval.

announcements.subject: CRISIL Ltd - 500092 - Business Responsibility and Sustainability Reporting (BRSR)
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed Business Responsibility and Sustainability Report of the Company.
announcements.ai_summary: CRISIL Ltd has released its Integrated Annual Report for the year ended December 31, 2025, which includes the Business Responsibility and Sustainability Report (BRSR). This BRSR, as per Regulation 34(2)(f) of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations 2015, forms part of the annual report. The company will hold its 39th Annual General Meeting (AGM) on Friday, April 17, 2026, at 2:30 p.m. IST. The AGM will be conducted through Video Conferencing (VC) and/or Other Audio Visual Means (OAVM). Investors can access the Integrated Annual Report and the AGM notice on CRISIL's website at www.crisil.com. For any queries, investors can reach out to investors@crisil.com.

announcements.subject: Coal India Ltd - 533278 - Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015- Giving Of Guarantee To CIL Rajasthan Akshay Urja Limited (CRAUL), A Subsidiary Of CIL
announcements.detail: CIL is giving guarantee to CRAUL a subsidiary of CIL
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Coal India Limited (CIL) has approved providing a guarantee to CIL Rajasthan Akshay Urja Limited (CRAUL), which is a subsidiary of CIL. This decision was made during a Board meeting, and further details are provided in an enclosed annexure as per SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Starlineps Enterprises Ltd - 540492 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Preferential Issue

These shares are being allotted to non-promoters at a price of Rs. 6 per share, including a premium of Rs. 5. This decision follows previous intimations and in-principle approval from BSE Limited.

announcements.ai_summary: AK Capital Services Limited's Banking and Investment Committee approved the issuance of Commercial Papers on March 23, 2026. The company plans to list 100 units of Commercial Papers on BSE Limited, each with a face value of INR 5,00,000, aggregating to INR 5,00,00,000, with a maturity date of October 15, 2026.

announcements.subject: Patel Engineering Ltd-$ - 531120 - Outcome Of Meeting With Investors
announcements.detail: Outcome of Meeting with Investors held on Monday, March 23, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: On March 23, 2026, officials from Patel Engineering Ltd participated in the 11th Annual Valorem Conference. They interacted with analysts and investors in a physical group meeting format. Discussions were based on publicly available information, and no unpublished price sensitive information was shared.

announcements.subject: Coral Laboratories Ltd - 524506 - Completion Of Capacity Expansion At Dehradun Plant
announcements.detail: The company has successfully completed capacity expansion at Dehradun plant. Please refer the attached documents.
announcements.ai_summary: Coral Laboratories Ltd has successfully completed the capacity expansion at its Dehradun plant, increasing the General Pharmaceuticals Formulation (Ointment) unit capacity to 360,000 kgs. The company has commenced commercial operations at the expanded facility, following its earlier announcement on October 13, 2025.

announcements.subject: Roadstar Infra Investment Trust - 544374 - Reg 23(5)(i): Disclosure of material issue

announcements.ai_summary: Roadstar Infra Investment Trust's Board, via circular resolution on March 23, 2026, noted and approved the disclosure of certain information, potentially including unpublished price sensitive information (UPSI), related to Infrastructure Leasing & Financial Services Limited's (IL&FS) proposed sale of its investments in the Sponsor, units of the Trust, and associated entities. This disclosure is made in accordance with Regulation 3(3)(ii) of SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: GOCL Corporation Ltd-$ - 506480 - Update On Monetization Of Land At Yelahanka, Bengaluru (Ecopolis)
announcements.detail: Update on monetization of land at Yelahanka, Bengaluru (Ecopolis)
announcements.ai_summary: GOCL Corporation Ltd has approved the early monetization of its approximately 38-acre land at Yelahanka, Bengaluru, known as the 'ecopolis' project. This land is under a joint development agreement with Hinduja Realty Ventures Limited. The company plans to sell the entire land and buildings to a top industrial house for a total consideration of approximately Rs. 2,261 crores, with the transaction to be completed in tranches.

announcements.subject: Bheema Cements Ltd - 518017 - Board Meeting Outcome for Meeting Of The Board Of Directors Held On March 23, 2026

announcements.subject: India Finsec Ltd - 535667 - Disclosures of reasons for encumbrance by promoter of listed companies under Reg. 31(1) read with Regulation 28(3) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011.

announcements.subject: Sattrix Information Security Ltd - 544189 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release

This recognition highlights Mr. Gajjaer's leadership and the company's advancements in AI-enabled cyber resilience and digital security standards in India.

announcements.subject: Achyut Healthcare Ltd - 543499 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Allotment
announcements.detail: Disclosure for Allotment of Equity Shares under Preferential Issue
announcements.ai_summary: Achyut Healthcare Ltd approved the allotment of 58,00,000 equity shares at a premium of Rs. 5 per share on a preferential basis. The company has received ₹6 per equity share, totaling ₹3,48,00,000, from promoter and non-promoter groups. This allotment is in compliance with SEBI regulations.

announcements.subject: Balkrishna Industries Ltd-$ - 502355 - Outcome Of The Meeting Of The Finance Committee Of The Board Of Directors Of Balkrishna Industries Limited Held On 23Rd March, 2026 Under Regulation 30 And Other Applicable Provisions Of Securities And Exchange Board Of India (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 As May Be Amended.
announcements.detail: Outcome of the meeting of the Finance Committee of the Board of Directors of Balkrishna Industries Limited
