This meeting follows a previous intimation on February 25, 2026, regarding the proposed issuance of non-convertible debentures on a private placement basis.

announcements.subject: Shalibhadra Finance Ltd - 511754 - Disclosure In Terms Of Regulation 29(2) Of Securities And Exchange Board Of India (Substantial Acquisition Of Shares And Takeovers) Regulations, 2011
announcements.detail: Disclosure in term of Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (SAST) Regulation 2011.
announcements.ai_summary: Ayushi Doshi, who belongs to the Promoter/Promoter group of Shalibhadra Finance Limited, has made a disclosure under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The disclosure pertains to acquisition or disposal of shares in Shalibhadra Finance Limited, where Ayushi Doshi is the acquirer.

announcements.subject: Knowledge Realty Trust - 544481 - Reg 23(5)(i): Disclosure of material issue
announcements.detail: Knowledge Realty Trust has informed the Exchange regarding Disclosure of material issue
announcements.ai_summary: Knowledge Realty Trust, through its manager Knowledge Realty Office Management Services Private Limited, has informed the Exchange about the closure of the Trading Window for dealing in its securities. This action is in pursuance of SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015. The closure affects trading in Units, Non-Convertible Debentures, and other securities of the Trust.

announcements.subject: KSB Ltd - 500249 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Earnings Call Transcript
announcements.detail: Detailed transcript is attached.
announcements.ai_summary: KSB Limited has submitted the Transcript of the Institutional Investors Meet held on March 17, 2026. This transcript is in continuation of previous intimations dated March 11, 2026, and March 17, 2026. The meet included presentations from the Managing Director, Chief Financial Officer, and Company Secretary of KSB Limited.

announcements.subject: Shree Hari Chemicals Export Ltd - 524336 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Acquisition
announcements.detail: The Company has been alloted 49,49,999 fully paid up Equity Shares of face value of Rs. 10/- each on Right Issue basis at par on March 23, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Shree Hari Chemicals Export Ltd has made an investment of Rs. 4,94,99,990/- in its Wholly Owned Subsidiary, Shakambhari Dyechem Private Limited (‘SDPL’). This investment was made on March 23, 2026, through a subscription to SDPL's rights issue at par. As a result, Shree Hari Chemicals Export Ltd has been allotted 49,49,999 fully paid-up Equity Shares of face value Rs. 10/- each. This transaction is in accordance with SEBI Listing Regulations and SEBI Master Circular No. HO/49/14/14(7)2025-CFD-POD2/I/3762/2026 dated January 30, 2026. The company has requested that this information be taken on record.

announcements.subject: Veranda Learning Solutions Ltd - 543514 - Notice Convening Meeting Of The Equity Shareholders Of The Company Pursuant To The Order Of Honorable National Company Law Tribunal, Chennai Bench
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed the notice of meeting of the Equity shareholders of the Company scheduled to be held on Friday April 24,2026 at 11.00 A.M (I.S.T) via VC/OAVM
announcements.ai_summary: Veranda Learning Solutions Ltd has scheduled a meeting of its Equity Shareholders for Friday, April 24, 2026, at 11:00 AM IST. This meeting will be conducted via Video Conferencing (VC)/ Other Audio Visual Means (OAVM). The meeting is being convened pursuant to an Order dated March 18, 2026, from the Hon’ble National Company Law Tribunal, Chennai Bench, in Company Scheme Application No. C.A.(CAA)/13/CHE/2026. The purpose of the meeting is to consider and approve a Composite Scheme of Arrangement amongst Veranda Learning Solutions Ltd and Veranda XL Learning Solutions Private Limited. This notice is issued in compliance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Suraj Industries Ltd - 526211 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Updates on Acquisition
announcements.detail: Update on Acquisition.
announcements.ai_summary: Suraj Industries Ltd has completed the acquisition of 1,40,000 equity shares in M/s Shri Gang Industries and Allied Products Limited (“Shri Gang”) on March 23, 2026. Specifically, 1,05,000 shares were acquired from Mr. Vikas Gupta and 35,000 shares from Mr. Ritesh Gupta. Following this acquisition, Suraj Industries Ltd's shareholding in Shri Gang has increased to 20.02% of its paid-up equity share capital. This update follows a previous intimation on March 19, 2026, and is in accordance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The company has requested that this change in equity stake be recorded.

announcements.subject: Kanpur Plastipack Ltd - 507779 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Conversion of Securities
announcements.detail: Intimation of allotment of equity  shares pursuant to Conversion of Warrants.
announcements.ai_summary: On March 23, 2026, Kanpur Plastipack Ltd's Preferential Issue Committee approved the allotment of 4,66,500 equity shares. These shares are being issued upon the conversion of an equal number of warrants, which were initially allotted on a preferential basis on May 15, 2025. The conversion price for these warrants is ₹130 per share, which includes a premium of ₹120 per share. This conversion increases the company's outstanding equity share count.

announcements.subject: Nexome Capital Markets Ltd - 508905 - Intimation On Closure Of The Issue Period Of The Rights Issue Of Nexome Capital Markets Limited. (The "Company")
announcements.detail: Intimation on closure of the issue period of Rights Issue of Nexome Capital Markets Limited.
announcements.ai_summary: Nexome Capital Markets Ltd has announced the closure of its rights issue period. The issue, which opened on March 13, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. IST, closed on March 23, 2026, at 05:00 p.m. IST. The rights issue aimed to raise an amount aggregating up to Rs 2203.875 Lakhs.

announcements.subject: Mercantile Ventures Ltd - 538942 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Scheme of Arrangement
announcements.detail: Filing of Second motion petition with Hon''ble National Company Law Tribunal, Chennai
announcements.ai_summary: Mercantile Ventures Limited has filed a Second Motion Petition with the Hon’ble National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Chennai Bench. This filing is in connection with the proposed Scheme of Amalgamation of India Radiators Limited (Transferor Company) with Mercantile Ventures Limited (Transferee Company). This follows previous disclosures regarding the scheme dating back to April 08, 2025.

announcements.subject: AI Champdany Industries Ltd - 532806 - Intimation Of Disposal Off Petition By NCLT, Kolkata Bench
announcements.detail: Please find the attachment
announcements.ai_summary: AI Champdany Industries Limited has informed BSE that a petition pending before the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Kolkata Bench, has been amicably settled. The NCLT, Kolkata Bench, disposed of the petition as withdrawn via an order dated March 11, 2026, in Original Petition No. 80 (KB) of 2025. All related applications have also been disposed of.

announcements.subject: EPL Ltd - 500135 - Certificate Confirming Fulfilment Of Payment Obligations Of Commercial Papers Issued By EPL Limited
announcements.detail: Certificate confirming fulfilment of payment obligations of Commercial Papers issued by EPL Limited on December 23, 2025, with a maturity date March 23, 2026, is enclosed herewith.
announcements.ai_summary: EPL Limited has confirmed the fulfilment of its payment obligations for Commercial Papers (CPs) issued on December 23, 2025. The company fully redeemed these CPs, aggregating to Rs. 30 Crore, on their maturity date of March 23, 2026. This confirmation is in accordance with SEBI's Master Circular.

announcements.subject: DIC India Ltd - 500089 - Shareholder Meeting / Postal Ballot-Scrutinizer''s Report
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed Voting Results under Regulation 44 of SEBI LODR and Scruitnizers Report
announcements.ai_summary: DIC India Ltd has submitted the voting results and Scrutinizer's Report for its 78th Annual General Meeting (AGM). The AGM was held on March 23, 2026, and transacted business as set out in the convening notice. The results are in accordance with Regulation 44 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations.

announcements.subject: GTV Engineering Ltd - 539479 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Preferential Issue
announcements.detail: Preferential Issue of Equity Shares (Share Swap - Consideration other than Cash).
announcements.ai_summary: GTV Engineering Ltd's Board of Directors approved a Preferential Issue of Equity Shares, structured as a share swap with consideration other than cash. The Board also approved giving loans, guarantees, or making investments up to Rs. 100 crore, subject to shareholder approval. The meeting took place on March 23, 2026.

announcements.subject: AJC Jewel Manufacturers Ltd - 544425 - Regulation 30 LODR - Postal Ballot
announcements.detail: Regulation 30 LODR - Postal Ballot
announcements.ai_summary: AJC Jewel Manufacturers Ltd has issued a notice for a Postal Ballot, in accordance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The notice, along with an explanatory statement, is being sent electronically to eligible members. This action is taken as per Companies Act, 2013 and relevant MCA/SEBI circulars.

announcements.subject: Shri Vasuprada Plantations Ltd - 538092 - Compliances-Reg. 57 (1) - Certificate of interest payment/Principal in case of NCD
announcements.detail: Certificate of payment of interest in respect of Secured Non-Convertible Debentures
announcements.ai_summary: Shri Vasuprada Plantations Ltd has made a timely interest payment of Rs. 92,38,440 (net of TDS) on its 9% Rated Listed Senior Secured Redeemable Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs). The interest payment was for the ISIN INE574G07010, with an issue size of Rs. 23,00,00,000. The payment was made on the due date of March 23, 2026, with the record date being March 6, 2026.

announcements.subject: Unified Data Tech Solutions Ltd - 544406 - Submission Of Media Release Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Submission of Media Release under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR)Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Unified Data-Tech Solutions Limited has been nominated for the 'Best Performing Listed Company' award at the ET MSME Awards 2025. This nomination recognizes the company's performance in the Data Centre Infrastructure and Cloud Sector – System Integration. The announcement was made via a media release submitted to the stock exchange.

announcements.subject: Vedanta Ltd - 500295 - Clarification/Confirmation On News Items Appearing In 'Media/Publication'
announcements.detail: Please refer the enclosed file.
announcements.ai_summary: Vedanta Ltd has clarified that its legal proceeding challenging the NCLT nod to Adani's bid for acquiring Jaiprakash Associates is a matter initiated in its capacity as a stakeholder. The company stated this legal action does not have any material impact on its operations, financial position, or performance. Vedanta Ltd confirmed compliance with all disclosure requirements and is unaware of any undisclosed information impacting its stock price or trading volume.

announcements.subject: Kamdhenu Ltd - 532741 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Acquisition
announcements.detail: Disclosuer of Acquisition
announcements.ai_summary: Kamdhenu Limited's Loan and Investment Committee approved the conversion of an existing unsecured loan of Rs. 10 crore provided to M/s Maa Kudargarhi Steels Private Limited (MKSPL) into 20,000 equity shares. These shares will be issued at a premium of Rs. 4990 each on a private placement basis. The valuation for this conversion was based on a report by Mr. Nitin Goyal.

announcements.subject: POWERGRID Infrastructure Investment Trust - 543290 - Reg 23(5)(i): Disclosure of material issue
announcements.detail: POWERGRID Infrastructure Investment Trust has informed the Exchange regarding Disclosure of material issue
announcements.ai_summary: POWERGRID Infrastructure Investment Trust (PGInvIT) announced the closure of its trading window from March 31, 2026. This closure will remain in effect until 48 hours after the declaration of PGInvIT's financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. This is in accordance with the company's policy on Unpublished Price Sensitive Information.

announcements.subject: Maruti Interior Products Ltd - 543464 - Right Issue Committee Meeting
announcements.detail: Right issue committee meeting
announcements.ai_summary: Maruti Interior Products Ltd has extended the closing date of its ongoing Rights Issue of 4,53,00,000 Equity Shares. The Rights Issue closing date has been moved from March 24, 2026, to April 6, 2026. Trading in Rights Entitlements (REs) on the stock exchange will remain suspended as per the earlier schedule.

announcements.subject: Smartworks Coworking Spaces Ltd - 544447 - Voluntary Disclosure - Acquisition Of Equity Shares Of Smartworks Coworking Spaces Limited ('The Company') By Promoter.
announcements.detail: Voluntary Disclosure - Acquisition of Equity Shares of Smartworks Coworking Spaces Limited ("the company") by Promoter
announcements.ai_summary: SNS Infrarealty LLP, the Promoter of Smartworks Coworking Spaces Limited, has acquired equity shares of the company from the open market. This acquisition represents less than 2% of the total shareholding or voting rights. The company is voluntarily disclosing this information for transparency, as it does not trigger mandatory disclosure requirements under SEBI regulations.

announcements.subject: Emkay Global Financial Services Ltd - 532737 - Proceedings Of Postal Ballot
announcements.detail: Proceedings of Postal Ballot
announcements.ai_summary: Emkay Global Financial Services Ltd has announced the proceedings of its postal ballot, specifically the scrutinizer's report on remote e-voting results. The special resolution sought consent from members for the appointment of Mr. Raunak Karwa as a Whole-Time Director, designated as Executive Director for three years, and for the payment of his remuneration.

announcements.subject: Prabha Energy Ltd - 544379 - Corporate Action-Outcome of Right issue
announcements.detail: Revised Outcome of Rights Issue Committee Meeting held today, i.e. March 23, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Prabha Energy Ltd has issued a corrigendum regarding its Rights Issue Committee Meeting outcome, revising the issue schedule due to a typographical error. The on-market trading in Rights Entitlements (REs) has been extended to March 30, 2026, and the Rights Issue closing date is now April 06, 2026. All other terms of the Rights Issue remain unchanged.

announcements.subject: Reganto Enterprises Ltd - 517393 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press release
announcements.ai_summary: Reganto Enterprises Limited, formerly Vintron Informatics Limited, has announced a strategic expansion into four new business verticals. These include Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) Solutions, IT Systems Integration & Infrastructure, Technology & Corporate Supplies, and Engineering, Procurement & Construction (EPC) Services. This expansion marks a significant transformation for the Delhi-based company with a 35-year legacy.

announcements.subject: Enbee Trade & Finance Ltd - 512441 - Board Meeting Outcome for For Meeting Of The Rights Issue Committee Of Enbee Trade & Finance Limited Under Regulation 30 Of The Securities And Exchange Board Of India (LODR) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: The Rights Issue Committee in their meeting held today, i.e., Monday March 23, 2026, inter alia, has considered, that the last Date for receipt of applications in the ongoing ''Rights Issue'' of the Company has been extended from Friday, March 27, 2026 to Friday, April 10, 2026. We request you to kindly take this on record.
announcements.ai_summary: The Rights Issue Committee of Enbee Trade & Finance Limited has extended the last date for receiving applications for its ongoing Rights Issue. The deadline has been moved from March 27th, 2026, to April 10th, 2026. Consequently, the last date for renunciation through on-market transfer is now April 7th, 2026.

announcements.subject: Brainbees Solutions Ltd - 544226 - Response To The Volume Movement Letter Issued By BSE Vide E-Mail Dated March 23, 2026
announcements.detail: Response to the volume movement letter issued by BSE vide e-mail dated March 23, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Brainbees Solutions Ltd has responded to a BSE query regarding increased trading volume in its securities. The company stated that all material information has been duly disclosed to the stock exchanges and its website. Brainbees Solutions Ltd believes the volume movement is market-driven and will continue to comply with disclosure obligations.
